ui_terms_of_use_desc:
Welcome to Broken Arrow! To ensure all players enjoy a fair and positive experience, we ask that every member of our community follows this Code of Conduct. Violations may result in penalties, including temporary suspensions or permanent bans.

If you encounter bugs pleases report them using the bug icon located in the top right corner.

We automatically collect data to help us improve the game. This includes basic computer configuration, client ID and game logs. We store this data for no more than 14 days and use it to analyze and search for bugs.

ui_popup_proxy_recommendation_text:
Currently, some players may experience difficulties connecting to game servers. These difficulties are related to a number of external restrictions that are beyond the control of our servers.

As an experimental solution to improve connection stability and quality, we have implemented a proxy function. 

Please note that this feature does not support the simultaneous use of third-party services that bypass restrictions or change geolocation. If you actively use them, stable connection is not guaranteed. 

You can disable this setting in the future as follows: Game Settings → Gameplay → Accessibility → Use Proxy → Off

ui_loadhint_text_shiftorders: Hold "Shift" key to queue orders. A queued order will be applied automatically once the previous order is over.
ui_loadhint_text_deckrule: When creating a battlegroup, you can exceed the limit in each section by 10%, but the total cost of the battlegroup must not exceed 10,000.
ui_loadhint_text_radars: Activating your radars increase your detection and engagement range against helicopters and aircraft.
ui_loadhint_text_interception: Activating your radar allows to intercept enemy cruise missiles. Ballistic missiles can also be intercepted by the long range surface to air missiles.
ui_loadhint_text_sead_missiles: Some planes and helicopters can be equipped with anti-radiation missiles automatically targeting active radars. Turn off your radar to avoid being targeted.
ui_loadhint_text_autoprotection: You can enable or disable the automatic use of smoke and decoys by right clicking their button in the orders panel at the bottom right.
ui_loadhint_text_agm: Missiles like AGM-65 or Kh-38 automatically target units designated with a laser. Otherwise the plane needs to make a strafing run attack to shoot them.
ui_loadhint_text_laser_shells: Laser guided artillery and bombs correct their trajectory and turn in the direction of any friendly laser marking.
ui_loadhint_text_manage_supply: If you select a supply crate you can choose to deactivate repairs or ammunition resupply.
ui_loadhint_text_los_tool: Press left "Alt" key to check the line of sight from a position.
ui_loadhint_text_drag_bombs: High Drag Bombs are dropped from low altitude, so your plane can avoid long range air-defense.
ui_loadhint_text_fm_draganddrop: Artillery area can be enlarged by holding Left Click and dragging the mouse, both for circular or linear modes.
ui_loadhint_text_direct_unload: Use the unload order on a building for the dismounting infantry to automatically enter it after exiting its transport.
ui_loadhint_text_save_units: It is better to order a damaged unit to retreat than lose it in combat. You get a partial refund when retreating units back to the base.
ui_loadhint_text_war_economy: Sustaining a large army has its cost. The more units you have on the battlefield the less income you will get.
ui_loadhint_text_hit_and_run: Infantry cannot sustain the firepower of tanks. So don't stay in their line of fire : try to immobilize them with a few RPG shots then retreat behind a building or deeper inside of a forest.
ui_loadhint_text_autoloader: Units equipped with an autoloader do not receive a negative effect to reload speed from panic.
ui_loadhint_text_shoot_and_scout: Don't forget to move your artillery and long range anti-aircraft missile units after shooting, the enemy will certainly try to fire on their last known position.
ui_loadhint_text_rpg_crit: Internal components of vehicles can be damaged when they are hit which lowers their efficiency. Use supplies to repair your vehicles and remove the critical effects.
ui_loadhint_text_supply_line: Resupplying your troops is essential to keep them alive and fighting. Don't wait for them to run out of ammunition to buy supplies or they will be dead by the time the truck arrives.
ui_loadhint_text_low_alt: Planes flying low negate the range bonus granted by radars but have a limited detection range against other planes flying low.
ui_loadhint_text_logistic_line: You can bring logistics with trucks, helicopters and cargo planes. Don't let your men run out of beans, bullets, and band aids!

ui_playerline_deserter_hint:
A player is considered a “deserter” when the Return to Battle timer has expired. 
If the timer has not expired but the team has lost, the player is also considered a “deserter”.

Deserters:
  - The drop rate of deserters increases at the end of a match.
  - Deserters can lose Elo, but cannot win Elo.
  - Deserters don't earn XP.
  - Deserters cannot earn medals.

ui_hint_bind_move_fast: Order for units to move to the point using the fastest possible route, usually with the help of roads.
ui_hint_bind_order_stop: Cancels all orders in the queue of selected units.
ui_hint_bind_attack: Order for units to either attack specific enemy unit or move to the order point and stop to engage enemy units encountered on the way, if the order is validated on the ground.
ui_hint_bind_force_fire: Order for units to fire their direct-fire weapons at the selected point on the ground.
ui_hint_bind_hold_fire: Units will start firing only if aimed at by a visible enemy.
ui_hint_bind_fire_mission: Order used by artillery to fire on specific ground position.
ui_hint_bind_smoke_position: Hotkey for fire-mission with predefined settings to quickly fire smoke rounds.
ui_hint_bind_precision_strike: Order to use precision munitions against specific ground targets.
ui_hint_bind_strafing_run: Order for planes to strafe in a line between two points while firing direct fire weapons and air-to-ground missiles.
ui_hint_bind_bombing_run: Order for aircraft to drop regular bombs in a line between two points.
ui_hint_bind_afterburner: Ability of planes to increase their max speed in exchange for greater fuel consumption.
ui_hint_bind_ability_sprint: Ability of infantry squads to temporary increase speed.
ui_hint_bind_ability_decoy: Airplanes and helicopters can drop decoys to disrupt the targeting of enemy missiles.
ui_hint_bind_ability_smoke: Ground units can use smoke grenades for defensive purposes to block the enemy's field of vision.
ui_hint_bind_ability_laser: Mark a position or an enemy with a laser. Ensures that laser-guided munitions hit the location marked by the laser.
ui_hint_bind_ability_radar: Ability to increase altitude optics and weapons range on the unit with radar.
ui_hint_bind_resupply: Ability to either resupply and/or heal other units.
ui_hint_bind_sneak: Ability for infantry to gain cover in open field at the cost of movement speed.
ui_hint_bind_airdrop: Orders cargo planes to parachute drop their cargo.
ui_hint_bind_altitude_change: Orders aircraft to change their altitude.
ui_hint_bind_unit_fov:
Activate the line of sight tool to check the field of view from the position of the mouse.
Key must be held down.
ui_hint_bind_height_tool:
Tool to see landscape height differences.
Key must be held down.
ui_hint_bind_attention_marker: Put attention marker on the map
ui_hint_bind_attack_marker: Put attack marker on the map
ui_hint_bind_defense_marker: Put defense marker on the map
ui_hint_bind_supply_marker: Put supply marker on the map
ui_hint_volume_main: Use main volume to change all the general volume instead of moving individual volume bars.
ui_hint_volume_ambience: The buzz of city, the sound of rain, birds and nature, etc.
ui_hint_volume_sfx_unit: Footsteps, engine noise, turret rotation, surfaces, etc.
ui_hint_volume_sfx_weapon: Sounds produced by guns and shell impacts.
ui_hint_screen_resolution:
Specifies your game resolution.
Affects VRAM usage.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Increase</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_vsync:
Vsync allows both the monitor and the GPU to work at the same rate.
This reduces the load on high-performance graphics cards, which typically achieve a higher refresh rate than the monitor can display.
ui_hint_frame_rate_limit: An FPS limiter is a tool that sets the FPS rate of a game to a certain rate.
ui_hint_preset: Presets allow the changing of all graphical settings at once.
ui_hint_image_scaling:
FSR 3.0 image up-scaling.
Increases performance of graphics in the game at the cost of extra CPU calculations.

Overscale option does the down-scaling instead to get better picture, and should only be used on powerful PCs.
ui_hint_stream_budget: Stream budget specifies how many MB of streaming textures to keep in memory at a time.
ui_hint_water_quality:
This specifies the water quality.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
ui_hint_water_reflections:
This specifies the water reflections quality.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
ui_hint_water_caustics:
This specifies the water caustics quality.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
ui_hint_decorations:
This specifies the amount of decorative objects on the map.

<color=#ED7A27>Applies after map restarting.</color>
ui_hint_unit_dirt: If turned on, units can get dirty when moving outside of roads.
ui_hint_shadows:
<color=#ED7A27>Turn off</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Turn on</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_shadow_resolution:
Resolution of the shadows.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Increase</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_shadow_cascades:
Shadow cascade uses different resolution of shadows depending on the distance to camera.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Increase</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_post_processing:
<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Increase</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_bloom:
Blurriness of light effect on the bright edges of scene. Creates illusion of bright light outside of its source.

<color=#ED7A27>Turn off</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Turn on</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_volumetric_fog:
This is a rendering function that simulates how light passes through a scene containing fog (dust, smoke, particles, steam, etc.).
For Broken Arrow, only for close-range in-game.

<color=#ED7A27>Turn off</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Turn on</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_volumetric_clouds:
Creates illusion of volume in the sky, makes cloud shadows, and draws volumetric light and fog.

<color=#ED7A27>Decrease</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>performance</color>.
<color=#ED7A27>Increase</color> the value to improve <color=#ED7A27>quality</color>.
ui_hint_sharpness: Sharpness adds in a slight amount of edge enhancement.
ui_hint_visual_effects_count:
Vfx source count controls how many visual effects will be on the map at the same time.
Affects tracers, smoke, explosions, dust, etc.

<color=#ED7A27>Lower count</color> will improve performance.
<color=#ED7A27>Higher count</color> will improve the image quility.
ui_hint_vfx_lens_flare: Add lens flare for some visual effects
ui_hint_vfx_shadows: Add dynamic shadows for vfx lights
ui_hint_light_sources_count:
Light source count controls how many light sources will be on the map.
Affects muzzle flashes, explosion flashes, etc.
ui_hint_doubleclick_fastmove: If enabled, double right-clicking triggers a fast-move order.
ui_hint_minimap_rotation: If enabled, minimap will match camera rotation.
ui_hint_camera_sensitivity: Camera sensitivity when either using a hotkey or moving the cursor near the edge of the screen.
ui_hint_camera_shake_sensitivity: Sensitivity of camera shake from explosions and other effects
ui_hint_camera_border: If enabled, camera will move when the cursor is near edge of the screen.
ui_hint_camera_rotation: Same functionality as holding middle mouse button.
ui_label_color_setting_description: (1) You (also your and allied spawns and captured zones). (2) Transferred units. (3) Allied players. (4) Enemy players (first color is the main and is assigned to enemy zones and spawns). You can customize this colors.
ui_settings_key_already_assigned_warning: Key {r_name} is already assigned to {r_second_name}. Do you want to replace it?
ui_hint_region: Allows you to select a server region for network play. Multiplayer stats, progress, etc., will be different in each region. Changing region will require a restart.
ui_set_region_environment_changed_desc: You have changed the region, you need to restart the game for the changes to take effect
ui_set_region_cis_info_desc:
Due to the increasing number of problems with connection to global servers for players from CIS countries, we have added the ability to select the region of the game servers. You can choose between the global and CIS regions of the network infrastructure in the game settings; changing region will require you to restart the game.

Please note: progress made in the CIS region (including experience, rating, statistics, medals and other achievements) is tracked separately and is not synchronized with the global region data.

This temporary solution was implemented on an emergency basis to partially compensate for the current technical difficulties. Please note that if the situation does stabilize and we no longer need a separate structure for users in CIS countries, we cannot, at this time, guarantee that your progress will transfer over to the global system.

If you do not live in the CIS region, or are not experiencing connectivity difficulties, we do not recommend that you change regions.

We apologize for any inconvenience. We thank you for your patience and understanding as we try to manage a situation beyond our control.
ui_set_other_players_messages_desc: Display or hide messages sent by other players in the chat.
ui_set_other_players_map_drawing_desc: Display or hide the markings from teammates on the map during the planning phase.
ui_spec_usmc_description: The United States Marine Corps is a versatile assault force using amphibious vehicles, helicopters and planes.
ui_spec_armored_description: The armored brigade gives you access to the heaviest and most powerful ground vehicles of the US army. This fire power comes at the cost of a poor mobility and the total absence of air units.
ui_spec_airborne_description: Airlift infantry and light vehicle with planes and helicopters to deliver firepower where and when it is the most needed.
ui_spec_cavstryker_description: Strykers are fast wheeled armored vehicles able to outmaneuver the enemy and exploit gaps in their defenses.
ui_spec_socom_description: Elite soldiers supported by stealth aviation striking deep into enemy territory.
ui_spec_vdv_description: The russian airborne forces can parachute troops and vehicles to rapidly strike from any direction.
ui_spec_guardtank_description: The elite guard tank brigade is equiped with the heaviest and most modern vehicles but doesn't benefit from any aircraft support.
ui_spec_coastal_description: While being primarily a defensive force, coastal troops are also capable in the offense thanks to their naval infantry riding amphibious armored vehicles.
ui_spec_moto_description: This highly mobile force can quickly move a large quantity of infantry with trucks and armored vehicles and support them with powerful rocket and launchers.
ui_spec_mech_description: "Quantity has a quality all its own." The numerous armored transport vehicles of the mechanized infantry specialization may not be the most powerful individually, but their strength lies in their numbers.
ui_spec_baltic_description: Lithuanian, Latvian and Estonian forces provide their support to form a multinational task force.
netserverstatusok: No known issues with game servers.
netserverstatusmaintenance: We are currently experiencing technical difficulties on our servers. Our team is already working to resolve them.
netserverstatusdown: The servers are down, we're working on it.
netchatmessagedisconnected: Player {r_name} has disconnected. {r_count} min to reconnect
netservergamemarketnoresponse: Authorization issues are observed on the game platform servers.
ui_lobby_startmoney_desc: Requisition points are spent to call units on the battelfield.
ui_lobby_income_desc: The amount of requisition points you earn per minute.
ui_lobby_upkeep_desc: The maintenance cost of unit on the battlefield (in %/minute)
ui_lobby_timer_desc: The match is separated into 3 phases of equal duration
ui_lobby_compensation_desc: For each war goal achived by the opposing team at the end of a phase, each player gains this amount of requisition points.
ui_lobby_size_description: Change the size of the playable zone and the number of objectives to accomodate different numbers of players.
pve_zombie_desc:
Hordes of zombies arrive from every direction!
• <indent=2%> Defend the evacuation zone and save a maximum of civilians!</indent>
• <indent=2%> Suvive!</indent>
pve_conquest_description:
• <indent=2%> Take control of all the objective zones to unlock a new area of the map.</indent>
• <indent=2%> Complete all areas before the end of the timer to win.</indent>
pve_defence_description:
• <indent=2%> Defend the strategic point from enemy waves</indent>
• <indent=2%> Capturing objective zones increases your income</indent>
• <indent=2%> Destroy enemy units to gain extra funds</indent>
pve_zombie_hint_01_virus: Be careful, your units killed will rise from the dead and come back as zombies!
pve_zombie_hint_01_civ: Uninfected civilians are still hiding in the city or forests. Evacuate these poor souls, and command will allocate you additional resources for each group rescued.
pve_zombie_hint_01_walker: Regular zombies. Slow, but they move in large groups. Don't let them get close to you!
pve_zombie_hint_01_runner: Morning joggers infected while they were running, or stretching, or whatever these people do. Anyways they are now fast moving zombies.
pve_zombie_hint_01_spitter: Long-range, acid-spitting zombies. Dangerous to infantry in buildings, vehicles, helicopters, everyone!
pve_zombie_hint_01_boomer: Zombies bloated with explosive gases. Extremely resilient and dangerous, they explode if they get close to you.
pve_zombie_hint_01_smoker: Firemen turned into fire starters. Burning zombies obscuring the rest of the walking deads with a smoke veil. Explode in a burst of fire at close range.
pve_zombie_hint_01_thrower: A huge mutated zombie that hurls cars over enormous distances. A walking artillery.
pve_zombie_dial_0010: General Bennet, did you receive the same order as I did? A joint patrol following the demarcation line accross the city?
pve_zombie_dial_0020: Yes, Colonel. This is strange, normally it is supposed to be a demilitarized zone. Something fishy going on here.
pve_zombie_dial_0030: Well let's go, but tell your guys to be careful where they point their guns, everybody is on edge here.
pve_zombie_dial_0040: The patrol is under attack! What the hell?! Our men report that their dead comrades rise again and start attacking them!
pve_zombie_dial_0050: This must be some kind of virus, we need to stop the propagation. There are still civilians left in the city, we've set up an evacuation zone, escort the survivors to that point.
pve_zombie_dial_0060: Reinforcements are arriving. We need to hold until they are here.
pve_zombie_dial_0070: The wave is coming, get ready!
pve_zombie_dial_0090: Commander, city police are sheltering a group of civilians. Link up with them and escort them to the base.
pve_zombie_dial_0110: Lieutenant Petrov has contacted me, he's been wounded! Go get him and escort him to the evacuation zone.
pve_zombie_dial_0120: The trucks with help have arrived.
pve_zombie_dial_0130: Zombies have taken over the truck! Kill them!
pve_zombie_dial_0140: These zombies have broken my defenses! I'll reinforce the headquarters.
pve_zombie_dial_0150: There are countless of them! It seems like this is the end...
pve_zombie_dial_0170: We've held the city. Congratulations, Commander !
dlc_2_kadaga_desc: Conduct a fighting retreat around the military base of Kadaga.
dlc_2_kadaga_task:
- Organize the defense
- Evacuate the base
- Slow down the Russian advance
dlc_2_kadaga_hint:
"Luck is not on our side. And apparently, neither are our allies."

Colonel A. Savickas
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_110: The Russian forces are rapidly advancing toward Riga from the North and the East and the garrison of the city is not yet ready to receive this assault.
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_120: The nearby military base of Kadaga is hosting forces from the three Baltic States which were training together.
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_130: The base must be evacuated before it's surrounded and the Baltic forces will conduct a fighting retreat to gain us time.
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_210: The Russian assaults are well synchronized and we need to split our forces to avoid being outflanked from one side or the other.
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_220: The evacuation of the base is still ongoing so you need to gain us some time by conducting a fighting retreat with your troops.
dlc_2_kadaga_cut_230: You will have limited reinforcements coming from Riga so make sure to keep your units alive and fall back whenever it's necessary rather than losing them.
dlc_2_kadaga_hint_01_text: Move your unit in one of the zones to play this misison with the corresponding nation.
dlc_2_kadaga_hint_02_text: Move your units in one of the zones to be assigned to the defense of this flank.
dlc_2_kadaga_hint_04_text: Send your troops back to base to complete the mission.
dlc_2_kadaga_medal_1_c1: Don't give up any ground before orderd to.
dlc_2_kadaga_medal_1_c2: Evacuate at least some of your troops to Riga.
dlc_2_kadaga_medal_2_c1: Retieve the 2 Leopard tanks and keep them alive.
dlc_2_kadaga_medal_2_c2: Evacuate at least some of your troops to Riga.
dlc_2_kadaga_medal_3_c1: Retreat all your units to Riga. A minimum of 8 units must be retreated.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0030: The Russian forces will soon be upon us. We have gathered here the Baltic units which were training in the base.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0040: Choose which group you want to command.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0050: Lithuanian forces, a solid choice. Lithuania is the largest military out of the 3 and possesses the most modern equipment.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0060: Latvian forces. Old but reliable equipment paired with deadly Spike anti-tank missiles.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0070: The Estonian forces are not the largest, but their CV-90-transported infantry is definitely not to be trifled with.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0080: Okay. We’ll meet at the crossroads.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0090: We need to split to cover the two axis of attack. Send your troops in the direction of your choice and we'll cover the other side.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0100: Alright, you take the left we take the right. Let's go!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0110: Alright, you take the right we take the left. Let's go!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0120: The enemy forces pushing from the north on the left flank are mostly motorized infantry units. Be careful not to be outrun by their speed.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0130: The Russian force advancing from the east on the right flank are coming with tanks and IFVs, let's focus our best anti-tank units there.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0140: Dig in, hold the line, and don’t let them reach the highway to Riga!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0150: In the rush to withdraw from the base, we had to leave a pair of Leopard tanks behind. If you have time, you might want to send a unit there to retrieve them before they get captured.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0160: First Leopard tank retrieved. The second was last spotted next to the shooting range. Go get it fast.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0170: Both Leopards retrieved! Now get out of the base before the Russians arrive.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0180: The Russian forces have penetrated into the base, it's too late to get those Leopard tanks now.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0200: This is announcing their attack, prepare to fight!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0210: Those damn helicopters are hunting down our vehicles. Where is our air defense?
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0220: Excellent, their probing attacks have been repelled. Additional reserves are available. Use them to reinforce your positions.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0230: The evacuation of the base is complete, our reserves are starting to form a second line of defense. Hold your line for as long as you can and fall back when needed.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0240: Another artillery strike, prepare for a second assault!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0250: Second attack repelled! Our positions are now clearly identified, expect a much heavier assault next time.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0260: The enemy has broken through our first defensive line! Regroup on the second!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0270: Holly fuck! This artillery barrage is massive! They've decided to simply level our positions! Fall back to the second defensive line immediately! RUN!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0280: Our last reserves from Riga are available, you can call them in.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0290: They're approaching the second line of defense. Hold it!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0300: Multiple enemy strike planes detected, they're heading your way! Retreat to the final defensive line immediately!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0310: Here they come! Hold this line at all costs! The garrison of Riga still need some time.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0320: Allright that's enough, we've done everything we can but won't survive another assault. Command orders an immediate retreat toward Riga. Grab everything you can and send your troops back to the city.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0330: They went through our defences like a hot knife through butter. One flank lost means the other must retreat. This is not a fighting retreat any more but a rout.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0340: Evacuation complete. All our troops have made it and will reinforce the garrison of Riga. Congratulations!
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0350: Evacuation complete. Sadly some of our troops didn't made it. The rest of them will be joining the garrison of Riga.
dlc_2_kadaga_dial_0360: Evacuation failed. None of our troops made it back but their sacrifice gave time to the garrison of Riga to prepare their defense.
unlock_medal_easy: Finish the mission in any difficulty level
unlock_medal_medium: Finish the mission in medium difficulty or higher
unlock_medal_hard: Finish the mission in hard difficulty
campaign_baltic_desc: The Suwalki gap is a narrow strip of land acting as a double chokepoint between Kaliningrad and Belarus but also between Poland and the Baltic states.
us_transition_010: Russian troops are pouring into the Baltic States through every checkpoint from Narva in the North to Vilnius in the South.
us_transition_020: The Russians have threatened Europe with the use of nuclear weapons if they dare to get involved. The threat was effective, we've been left to fend for ourselves.
us_transition_030: We won’t be able to prevent the invasion of Estonia and Latvia, and could quickly end up bogged down in a long and exhausting war of attrition in Lithuania.
us_transition_040: We’re far from home and on our own. Our expeditionary units can hit hard and fast but will rapidly lose effectiveness.
us_transition_050: Then our best chance is to seize a bargaining chip to negotiate with.
us_transition_080: Hum, I like it. We have enough forces in Poland and in the Baltic sea to take the city and even the entire oblast if things go well.
us_transition_090: I will prepare attack plans on strategic targets around the city.
ru_transition_desc: Someone wants to talk to you.
ru_transition_030:
Lena, my dear, can you tell me what the fuck happened with this whole humanitarian convoy operation?
I’ve just had a call from above and they are not happy at all.
ru_transition_040: They opened fire on our troops, which was part of the mission's contingencies, and the mission was validated. We pushed them in a corner and forced them to show their true colours. Now the world cannot ignore the truth that they are the aggressors.
ru_transition_050: Lena, Lena, Lena, when will you learn. The world doesn't care about the truth, the truth is whatever the victor decides to tell when the war is over. So if I were you, I would make sure we are victorious, so you can tell your version of the story.
ru_transition_070:
Not officially of course, declaring war is a thing of the past. But this act of war cannot remain unanswered, we would lose face.
Contingency Plan 57 has been approved and is now in immediate effect. You know what to do. I hope I can count on you.
ru_transition_090: One last thing, I have seen the request for your team. Take Batalin and the Kommander... whatever his name is. They make sense, and their records are impeccable but are you sure about Demidov? He is a goner
ru_transition_100: Don’t worry, I have my reasons. I’m sure he will be up to the task.
ru_transition_110:
Still good at motivating men I see. But don’t fuck this up Lena. I won’t be here to save your nice little ass if you do.
[Hang up]
balt_conclusion_desc: Yet war endures, ever marching on.
balt_conclusion1_010: In Moscow, as in Washington, and throughout all of Europe, demonstrations for peace are being organized, bringing together hundreds of thousands of people.
balt_conclusion1_020: After less than a month of conflict, this war that doesn't want to be called a war has already taken a heavy toll on all its belligerents.
balt_conclusion1_021: Casualties number in the thousands, if not tens of thousands, provoking indignation among civilians who fail to understand the reason for the conflict.
balt_conclusion1_022: In Moscow, as in Washington, and throughout all of Europe, demonstrations for peace are being organized, bringing together hundreds of thousands of people.
balt_conclusion1_030:
Special diplomatic envoy Miller, mandated by Washington to find a way out of this conflict, spoke today after talks in Saudi Arabia with his Russian counterparts.
Let's hear him speak:
balt_conclusion1_040: First of all, I'd like to thank my Russian counterparts for their cooperation during the negotiations.
balt_conclusion1_050: We have succeeded in agreeing on an immediate ceasefire which will take effect tonight at midnight Moscow time.
balt_conclusion1_060: During this ceasefire, a status quo ante bellum will be established. Russian troops in the Baltic States will withdraw behind the Russian and Belarussian borders, while American troops will do the same in the Kaliningrad oblast.
balt_conclusion1_070: As a sign of appeasement we also wanted to ensure that those responsible for this conflict would be brought to justice in their respective countries.
balt_conclusion1_080: Namely, General Bennet and his aide-de-camp, Lieutenant Colonel Williams, have already been relieved of their duties and are awaiting trial by court-martial.
balt_conclusion1_090: On the Russian side, Colonel Demidov is expected to serve a prison sentence in an Arctic penal colony.
balt_conclusion1_091: On the Russian side, the SVR agent Elena Morozova is expected to serve a prison sentence in an Arctic penal colony.
balt_conclusion1_100: We welcome the outcome of these negotiations and announce the progressive withdrawal of the majority of our troops from Europe, leaving the newly created European Army the task to ensure stability in the region, while our troops will be redeployed to the Pacific to meet the growing security threats in that part of the world.
balt_conclusion2_010: In order to avoid a nuclear escalation between our two countries, and to stop this appalling bloodbath as soon as possible, we succeeded in agreeing with our Russian counterparts, after bitter negotiations, to the establishment of a demarcation line on the Daugava River between what we will henceforth call the Northern and Southern Baltic States.
balt_conclusion2_020: It will be the responsibility of the newly-formed European Army to enforce this line of demarcation, so American troops can redeploy to the Pacific to meet the growing security threats in this part of the world.
balt_conclusion2_030: Namely, General Bennet, who has already been relieved of his duties and is awaiting trial by court-martial.
balt_conclusion2_040: Major-General Williams who distinguished herself during this conflict will act as interim chief of staff during this transition period.
usm01_desc: The largest-ever military exercise in the Baltic States is about to begin.
usm01_task: - Make sure the exercise happens flawlessly.
usm01_hint: Camp Herkus is located less than 12 kilometers from the border with Belarus, where Russian troops conduct their own military exercises.
usm01_cine_010: American military presence in the Baltics has been reinforced in response to the Russian military exercises held on both sides of the Suwalki gap in Kaliningrad and Belarus.
usm01_cine_020: With more than 40,000 military personnel involved, ships, tanks, planes and helicopters, it's the biggest military exercise ever held in the region.
usm01_cine_030: Camp Herkus, the new permanent US base in the region, is at the epicenter of tensions, as US and Russian military exercises are held simultaneously less than 20 miles away from each other.
usm01_cine_040: The need for the permanent deployment of US forces in Lithuania is more apparent than ever and we are looking forward to continuing to take advantage of opportunities to enhance the interoperability of our forces, providing a credible deterrent against any potential aggression, and to operate more effectively should deterrence fail.
usm01_cine_050: General Bennet, you are in charge of US military operations in the region, why are US forces in such close proximity to the Russian exercise? Don't you fear this aggressive posture could lead to an escalation?
usm01_cine_060:
Last time I checked, Lithuania was a sovereign country. If it is their wish to host permanent US forces on their soil, I don’t see why Moscow should have a say in that.
Now if you excuse me, I have a military exercise to prepare.
usm01_brief_010: Good morning Commander. So... Have you seen me on the news? Everyone is talking about this exercise.
usm01_brief_020: It's not every day you see such a display of power. Reminds me of Desert Storm in 91....ah, the good old days...
usm01_brief_030: Anyway, Major Williams, how are the preparations coming along?
usm01_brief_040: The men are ready General, we can begin the exercise.
usm01_brief_060: One last thing General: a special diplomatic envoy sent by Washington has demanded to meet you. Counselor Miller.
usm01_brief_070: Of course it's Miller. No military demonstration in the world is complete without this vulture showing up.
usm01_brief_080: His stupid face is the last thing I want to see today. So let's go, we're on a schedule.
usm01_intel_01: Intelligence reports give you information about the different equipment that will be present on the field.
usm01_hint_01_text:
- Your units are blue
- Ally units are green
- Hostile units are red
- Neutral units are gray
You can customize these colors in the game options.
usm01_hint_02_text:
- Select your units with LMB
- Order a movement with RMB
- Double click RMB to follow the roads
- Vehicles move faster on roads and slower in forests.
usm01_hint_03_text:
Planar movement:
- WASD / Directional arrows
- Move the cursor near the border of the screen
- Press LMB and RMB and move the mouse
usm01_hint_04_text:
- Press MMB and move the mouse to rotate
- Use the mouse wheel to zoom
- Zoom on the label of unit to attach the camera to it
usm01_hint_05_text: The history of the hints you have viewed is located in the top right-hand corner of the screen.
usm01_hint_06_text: Artillery units don't fire automatically. Right click on the targets to give a fire mission command.
usm01_hint_07_text:
- Press T to open the fire mission interface
- Select the parameters of the strike.
- Validate the position with a LMB click or a drag & drop.
usm01_hint_08_text:
CRITICAL EFFECTS
- When a vehicle is hit there is a chance of receiving a critical effect reducing its abilities
- There are 4 types of critical effects: detection, aiming, reloading, mobility
- There are 2 levels of significance: yellow and red
- Fully repairing a vehicle removes the critical effects
usm01_hint_08b_text:
When a vehicle is hit there is a chance of receiving a critical effect.
Fully repairing a vehicle removes the critical effects
usm01_hint_09_text:
Supplies are bought from the reinforcements menu.
- Select a truck in the support category
- Click on the supplies to fill the truck
- Call in the truck with LMB on the map
usm01_hint_10_text:
You can load more than 1000kg of supplies
- Click on the supplies icon multiple times
- Ctrl+LMB loads 4000kg at a time
- Shift+LMB loads the maximum amount
usm01_hint_11_text:
- Click the UNLOAD button then validate on the map to unload the cargo there.
- Press the button twice to unload immediately.
usm01_hint_12_text:
- Cargo helicopters can transport multiple infantry squads but also supplies and vehicles.
- The limit for infantry is defined by the numbers of seats.
- The limit for supplies and vehicles is defined by the limit of weight.
usm01_hint_13_text: Select the transport helicopter and right click on a unit to give the order to load this cargo.
usm01_hint_14_text:
- Click the unload order and validate somewhere on the map to drop off the cargo.
- Click the unload order twice to unload immediately.
- You can click a specific element in the cargo panel to unload only this element.
usm01_hint_15_text: You can modify the game speed to accelerate, slow down or pause the game in the top right corner of the interface.
usm01_hint_16_text:
Your units are more stealthy when they are inside forest or buildings.
A green tree indicator appears on the cursor if you place it over a zone providing cover.
usm01_hint_17_text:
You need to be close enough to detect enemy units.
Buildings and thick forest block the line of sight.
To visualize your line of sight press the Left Alt key.
The distance checked correspond to the selected unit.
usm01_hint_18_text: Penetration enables projectiles to bypass some or all of a target's armor, increasing damage potential. There are two types of damage in the game: kinetic and explosive.
usm01_hint_181_text: Kinetic projectiles lose energy with distance, resulting in greater penetration at shorter ranges. Kinetic armor and penetration are represented in white in the statistics panel.
usm01_hint_182_text: Explosive projectiles, such as missiles or HEAT rounds, retain their destructive power regardless of distance.
usm01_hint_19_text: Radars increase detection and engagement range, particularly against high flying targets. The interception of missiles also require the activation of the radar. Anti-radiation missiles are special weapons tracking activated radars.
usm01_hint_20_text:
Reinforcements can be called in from the menu in the top left-hand corner.
The yellow number represents the quantity of points available and the white number the quantity earned per minute.
usm01_hint_21_text:
Suppressed infantry takes cover and crawls instead of running which reduces its speed but makes it harder to hit.
Some weapons like sniper rifles ignore this bonus of cover.
usm01_hint_22_text: Defensive smoke grenades can be used by both infantry and vehicles to block enemy's line of sight and conceal their position.
usm01_hint_23_text: The sprint ability of infantry allows to temporarily double their movement speed. This ability overrides the suppression effect and let you run into cover or charge the enemy.
usm01_hint_24_text:
Right click on an enemy unit to order a strike on its position.
If the target is not visible you can attack its suspected position with a strike order.
usm01_hint_25_text:
Use the return to base command to send your plane back to the spawn point and obtain a refund.
The refund price takes into account missing ammunition and damages.
usm01_hint_26_text: Bombing runs work like strafing runs: right click on the enemy or use the order to define the orientation of the strike.
usm01_hint_27_text:
- Right click on the target to order an attack.
- Click on the laser ability then validate it on the target and the bomb will follow the laser.
usm01_hint_28_text:
Laser guided bombs have a limited correction radius.
To hit moving targets try to predict their movement.
And don't forget to mark them with your laser.
usm01_hint_29_text: Sustaining a large army has its cost. The more units you have on the battlefield the less income you will get.
usm01_task_vip_hint: Move the Humvee to the indicated position.
usm01_task_tuto: Inspect all the training grounds ({var, CounterTutoAccomplished}/8)
usm01_task_arty_hint: Use the fire mission order to destroy all the targets.
usm01_task_repair_hint: Buy a truck full of supplies and unload it next to the damaged vehicles.
usm01_task_buytruck: Buy a truck filled with supplies
usm01_task_unload_hint: Unload supplies near the damaged vehicles to repair them.
usm01_task_lift_hint: Right click on the vehicle to order  the helicopter to lift it.
usm01_task_drop: Drop the damaged vehicle at the repair station
usm01_task_drop_hint: Use the unload order to drop the transported vehicle inside the indicated area.
usm01_task_stealth_hint: Avoid the patrols, stay in cover, cross the open areas with sprint.
usm01_task_cqc_hint: Call reinforcements, capture the enemy zone, don't lose yours.
usm01_task_capture_hint: Place infantry or vehicles inside the enemy zone to capture it.
usm01_task_a10: Call in an A-10 as reinforcement
usm01_task_rtb: Send the plane back to base.
usm01_task_rtb_hint: Use the "back to base" command in the bottom right corner.
usm01_medal_3_cond: Complete all the objectives in less than 30min
usm01_dial_0010:
Miller keeps calling and won't give me a break if I don’t throw him a bone.
Go pick him up at his hotel and take him for a tour Commander.
usm01_dial_0011: Show him around the base, do whatever you want as long as you keep him out of my hair.
usm01_dial_0020: And take Williams with you, no offense but she’s more talkative than you.
usm01_dial_0030: Well Commander, I guess we’re the bone then!
usm01_dial_0040: Miller’s hotel is on the way to the training area. Let’s hope he is in a better mood than the General.
usm01_dial_0041: There are units from all three Baltic states regrouped here: Lithuanian artillery, mechanized infantry from Latvia, as well as reservists and armored vehicles from Estonia.
usm01_dial_0042: They have different equipment, different tactics, speak different languages. Creating an interoperable force in this region is a real headache.
usm01_dial_0050: Miller keeps calling. What are you doing Commander? Go get him so he'll leave me alone!
usm01_dial_0060: Why is Miller still calling me Commander? Go pick him up!
usm01_dial_0070: Counselor Miller? I am Major Williams. It’s a pleasure to have you with us. The Commander and I will show you around on our way to the general, please hop in.
usm01_dial_0080: Well it’s about time, let’s go!
usm01_dial_0090: Take me to the training ground first, I need to make sure that our equipment is showcased in the best possible conditions.
usm01_dial_0100: The exercise is about to start so you will be able to check for yourself. But I didn’t know there was a show.
usm01_dial_0110: This whole exercise is for show Major. A show of force for our potential enemies but also an arms fair for our partners.
usm01_dial_0120: I see, and which partners are we trying to impress today, Counselor?
usm01_dial_0133: Can you step on the gas a bit? We're crawling.
usm01_dial_0134: Sorry Sir, there are strict speed regulations on the base.
usm01_dial_0140: So how is your hotel Counselor? I’ve heard it’s quite fancy.
usm01_dial_0150: Apart from the fact that I was woken up every 20 minutes by helicopters passing right over my head, it was lovely.
usm01_dial_0160: And how was your flight Counselor?
usm01_dial_0170: Completely unremarkable. You know, I spend half my life in the air, so the only surprises would be finding snakes on the plane, flying the thing myself or reaching my sixties without getting cancer.
usm01_dial_0180: By the way, Counsellor, where do you and the General know each other from?
usm01_dial_0181: Ah... We were friends once, good friends actually.
usm01_dial_0190: Can we just not have this conversation please? When do we get there?
usm01_dial_0191: Was Bennet's staff your first assignment, Commander? And what about you Major?
usm01_dial_0192: Yes Sir. It's been 5 years now.
usm01_dial_0193: Well, you didn't draw the winning ticket with him as CO. He was sidelined a long time ago, and you won't be able to advance your career if you stay attached to that sinking ship.
usm01_dial_0200: This is the artillery training ground Counselor. Here our soldiers practice fire mission procedures. The commander will make a demonstration for you.
usm01_dial_0210: Well, let’s see how much time it will take you to hit all these targets Commander.
usm01_dial_0215: Dispersion increases with distance, that's why more rounds are needed to hit targets located further away.
usm01_dial_0216: Smart munitions don't have this problem, they are much more accurate and can correct their trajectory to hit a target designated by a laser.
usm01_dial_0220: As you can see our latest battlefield management interface enables extremely responsive fire missions.
usm01_dial_0230: It was I who sold that concept to congress. Glad to see it works in practice too.
usm01_dial_0240: Is there a problem Commander? The mortars are waiting for a fire mission order to destroy the targets.
usm01_dial_0250: Well, I don't have all day Commander, will you manage to hit a target or not?
usm01_dial_0260: Our pilots are ready to take off, do you want to hop in for a ride Counselor?
usm01_dial_0270: Certainly, it will be a nice change from those little private helicopters that fly like cabs.
usm01_dial_0280: Cargo helicopters can transport troops and supplies but also vehicles as long as their weight allows it.
usm01_dial_0290: One of our vehicles broke down during a maneuver exercise. Let's go and recover it with our helicopter.
usm01_dial_0295: The hooks are in place, now let's drop it off at the repair station.
usm01_dial_0300: The vehicle has been unloaded, the mechanics will get it back in working order.
usm01_dial_0310: How about a little target practice now Counselor? Get behind one of the machine guns and we'll put you in range of some targets to shoot at.
usm01_dial_0320: But I have never fired a machine gun before!
usm01_dial_0330: Oh, don't worry, it's very simple. And I'll be here to help.
usm01_dial_0339: Here we go! [Sings Ride of the Valkyries]
usm01_dial_0340: Ahah! Get some! Get some! Ahah! Yeah!
usm01_dial_0360: Pretty impressive for someone who has never shot before.
usm01_dial_0362: All the targets are down, let's head back to the helipad.
usm01_dial_0370: I've not had that much fun in a long time! You sure know how to entertain Major!
usm01_dial_0380: You should come work with me. With you by my side getting those contracts signed would be a breeze. Plus you wouldn't have to work with this grumpy old man any more.
usm01_dial_0390: Thank you for the offer, but i am currently tied to my current assignment.
usm01_dial_0400: I see, well think about it.
usm01_dial_0410: Helicopters are impressive machines. But boy, they're noisy!
usm01_dial_0430: Some of our vehicles broke down apparently.
usm01_dial_0440: We cannot let that happen, not today!
usm01_dial_0450: Don’t worry sir, we have the necessary supplies to repair them.
usm01_dial_0460: The Commander will call in a cargo truck from the support group and make sure they bring a big load of supplies with them.
usm01_dial_0470: Thanks to the diagnostic system integrated into our vehicles we can easily identify which part is damaged.
usm01_dial_0480: As soon as the supplies are unloaded next to the vehicles the crew will handle the repairs automatically.
usm01_dial_0490: The truck was almost empty, we need more supplies than that.
usm01_dial_0500: The vehicles are now fully operational again.
usm01_dial_0530: Nothing, this is the close quarter training area. Infantrymen use these buildings to simulate urban combat.
usm01_dial_0540: The rules are simple: we try to capture their sector and they try to capture ours.
usm01_dial_0550: Sounds good, let’s see what you’re made of Commander!
usm01_dial_0555: Our troops are ready to be called as reinforcement Commander.
usm01_dial_0560: When a unit is low on ammo or heavily damaged it is preferable to send it back to base rather than abandoning it to its fate.
usm01_dial_0570: Units sent back to base become available again sooner and you receive a bonus of requisition points proportional to their condition.
usm01_dial_0571:
Infantry weapons have varying ranges and efficiency:
Long-range support weapons usually require the unit to be static to be used while short-range assault weapons can be fired on the move.
usm01_dial_0572: Assault weapons are also more effective once in range, and can be used to breach buildings held by enemy units.
usm01_dial_0573: Vehicles can provide excellent fire support, but are vulnerable to infantry anti-tank rockets. They must therefore be kept out of their range as much as possible.
usm01_dial_0574: When units are under fire or take damage their stress level increases which makes them less efficient. There are two levels of stress expressed by a blinking orange or red color on their label.
usm01_dial_0580:
Well that was a good show Commander.
But it demonstrates one thing: our allies are not ready at all to defend themselves.
usm01_dial_0590: Had it been the Russians in front of them today, they would have been slaughtered.
usm01_dial_0600: Failure is part of training sir, they are only reservists, they will continue to drill.
usm01_dial_0620: I'm sure the commander let them win so as not to demoralize them. They're only reservists, after all.
usm01_dial_0630: Ha! Is that so, Commander? Well, let's do it again. And this time, no mercy! We're here to show them the superiority of our tactics and equipment, not to look like fools.
usm01_dial_0640: I see nothing happening here, what is going on?
usm01_dial_0650: It’s a good sign Sir, our troops are exercising their camouflage skills here.
usm01_dial_0660: They try to reach the target area undetected by staying away from the hostile patrols, staying in cover as much as possible, and sprinting to move across open areas faster.
usm01_dial_0670: Recon units are specially trained and equipped to remain as discreet as possible. They have a reduced visual, thermal and electronic signature that makes them harder to detect.
usm01_dial_0680: Electronic signature? So they refrain from posting geolocalized selfies during the mission? Impressive!
usm01_dial_0720: Well, well, looks like we have hide-and-seek champions.
usm01_dial_0730: This is the tank firing range. A platoon of M1A2 Abrams is ready for the demonstration.
usm01_dial_0731: Tanks carry different types of rounds: Explosive rounds to engage infantry and lightly armored vehicles, and armor piercing rounds to deal with highly armored targets.
usm01_dial_0732: Explosive rounds are equally effective at any distance, but the penetration of armor piercing rounds increases the closer you get to the target.
usm01_dial_0733:
Tank armor is much stronger on the front than on the sides.
The training of our crews consists in maneuvering to engage the enemy from the flank while minimizing the exposure of their own flanks.
usm01_dial_0734: You should move closer to the targets to demonstrate the increased penetrating power of the kinetic ammunition Commander.
usm01_dial_0740: Very well, now can you send as many targets as possible? Let's see what a Soviet invasion of Europe would have looked like.
usm01_dial_0741:
Our tanks benefit from good reverse speed, which is not the case with Russian-designed tanks.
This allows us to move backward to avoid being overrun, while maintaining our powerful frontal armour facing the enemy.
usm01_dial_0750: Well this is it: 70 tons of American diplomacy!
usm01_dial_0760:
You mean 70 tons of a diplomatic nightmare!
I had to explain to the Lithuanian Government why they needed to reinforce all their road bridges from here to Poland to support their weight!
usm01_dial_0770: Sure, but when they arrive nothing stands in their way!
usm01_dial_0780: This is the ATGM shooting ground, it stands for anti-tank guided missiles.
usm01_dial_0781: They travel slower than tank rounds but have a greater range. Their use is therefore preferable when the line of sight is unobstructed.
usm01_dial_0790: Yeah, I know that, send the targets, let’s see that in practice.
usm01_dial_0800: In absence of specific command, the gunners communicate their targets to each other. If a missile is already in flight, the other gunner will give priority to another target. That way, no missiles are wasted.
usm01_dial_0810: It's a pleasant surprise to see I'm not the only one worrying about the taxpayers money here!
usm01_dial_0820: The range of the missiles can be superior to the detection range of the unit, so they generally work alongside recon units.
usm01_dial_0830: The gunners are trained to switch targets mid-flight if the initial target disappears, or if instructed to do so.
usm01_dial_0840: This is particularly useful as the long flight time of the missile can give time to the enemy to take cover or activate their smoke dischargers.
usm01_dial_0850:
I hope you used the old TOW-2A for this demonstration.
The new top attack TOW-2B costs twice as much so using them against anything other than a tank is a waste of resources.
usm01_dial_0860: Don't worry Sir, we use special training ammunition both cheaper and less hazardous than regular ammo during exercises.
usm01_dial_0870: Why is the radar of this Patriot turned off?
usm01_dial_0880: It's the standard procedure to keep the radar turned off by default to keep the unit mobile and avoid destruction by anti-radiation missiles.
usm01_dial_0890: They can still use their backup tracking systems to target aircraft, but in this mode their detection and engagement range are limited.
usm01_dial_0900: Then switch this radar on Commander, let's see how far target practice drones can be detected and engaged.
usm01_dial_0901: Wow! The range of these missiles is impressive!
usm01_dial_0902: The efficiency of the radar depends on the altitude of the target: Low flying aircraft are harder to detect and helicopters cannot be targeted at all as they fly below the minimum detection altitude of the radar.
usm01_dial_0903: That's why short range air defense, SHORAD, is needed to complement long range surface to air missiles.
usm01_dial_0910: Switch that radar on Commander. Let’s see how far we can detect those drones.
usm01_dial_0920: You are really boring Commander. Alright let’s go somewhere else.
usm01_dial_0930: A fine demonstration of our firepower, Commander. The message is clear: no country equipped with our anti-aircraft systems need worry about its airspace being violated.
usm01_dial_0940: Sir, the vehicles must be kept on the shooting platform for safety reasons.
usm01_dial_0950:
You've just attacked friendly units Commander! Either you're totally incompetent, or you're a Russian spy. And in either case, we're going to have a little chat in private.
Major put this man under arrest.
usm01_dial_0960: We are at the hangars Sir, the General is waiting for you. Are you sure you don’t want to check the rest of the equipment first?
usm01_dial_0970: We still have some time left actually. Let’s have a look around Major.
usm01_dial_0980: That's all well and good, but I’m not here for these trifles. I've got a major fighter jet contract to attend to.
usm01_dial_0990:
So here is the real show stopper!
I want you to demonstrate its air-to-ground and air-to-air capabilities for our guests.
usm01_dial_1000: Take a seat Miller, I’m in charge here.
usm01_dial_1010: Ah, General! I was wondering when you'd come out of hiding. So what’s on the menu Chef?
usm01_dial_1020: We'll start with a classic. Close air support with good old A-10s.
usm01_dial_1030: Yeah, like in '91, the good old days. You never change your record, do you?
usm01_dial_1050: Commander, you will be leading this demonstration. Call in an A-10 and order it to destroy the marked targets!
usm01_dial_1060: Planes must work in coordination with recon to target enemy ground units. The recon detects and identifies the target while the plane maneuvers to attack it.
usm01_dial_1070: Whoa, the sound of that gun always gives me chills! It reminds me of... well whatever!
usm01_dial_1080: Send the plane back to base before it runs out of fuel.
usm01_dial_1090: Your old crate is out of fuel. It has to land now or it will fall like a rock.
usm01_dial_1091: This plane is running out of ammo.
usm01_dial_1100: Call in another A-10 and finish the marked targets Commander.
usm01_dial_1105: Now call in a Harrier to make a bombing run.
usm01_dial_1110: Alright Commander, send in the F-15EX now.
usm01_dial_1130:
This plane is equipped with a laser designation pod and smart bombs.
You mark the target with the pod and the bombs will correct their trajectory to hit with pinpoint accuracy.
usm01_dial_1140: You see, making gun runs and guiding missiles is outdated. Now, you drop a bomb from as far as you can and you let it do the job for you.
usm01_dial_1150: Well, let's try again with a moving target this time, and you’ll see that a human is still needed to predict the target’s trajectory.
usm01_dial_1160: The target is still standing Commander. Don’t make us look like fools, we’re here to demonstrate the capabilities of this plane not your lack of competence.
usm01_dial_1170: What?! The plane crashed! What have you done Commander?!
usm01_dial_1180: Maybe it was a mechanical failure, who knows? Modern stuff breaks down constantly… unlike my good old A-10s haha!
usm01_dial_1190: Unacceptable! I’ll have your heads! Both of you!
usm01_dial_1200: Well… I'm not too worried about my head but he will certainly get yours Commander, you really fucked up today.
usm01_dial_1210: When you take one of these bombs on the face like that, the coffin they send back home doesn't weigh much, believe me.
usm01_dial_1220: Send in the second F-15 Commander, this time to demonstrate its air to air capabilities against drones.
usm01_dial_1230: We have potential buyers for dozens of these planes, so make sure these drones are shot down nice and clean Commander!
usm01_dial_1240: Remind me Miller, are we here to defend these people or to sell them weapons?
usm01_dial_1250:
Selling them weapons means they can defend themselves.
Teach a man to fish and you feed him for a lifetime.
I just make sure they buy from the right bait and tackle shop.
usm01_dial_1270: Drone destroyed, proceed to next target.
usm01_dial_1300: There’s one more drone Commander, finish it!
usm01_dial_1310: Great job Commander! If we don't land a contract for a few jets after that I'll be damned!
usm01_dial_1320: General, we’ve got a problem. I've asked confirmation from the airbase and they sent 3 drones as planned, not 4.
usm01_dial_1330: Oh shit! Don’t tell me we scratched some civies who can't read a map?
usm01_dial_1340: No sir, the radar signature was definitely that of a UAV.
usm01_dial_1350: Well, in any case that means trouble…
usm01_dial_1360: Wait, who are these guys? They are not part of the exercise, they've got nothing to do here!
usm01_dial_1370: Don't bother with that, Major. They're with me. They are my bodyguards of sorts.
usm02_desc: Tension escalates rapidly between NATO and Russia.
usm02_task:
- Spook out the enemy convoy.
- Do not fire unless fired upon.
- Improvise.
usm02_hint: Units in combat quickly run out of ammunition. Make sure you have supply dumps for your troops, and rotate between your fully supplied troops and those running out of ammunition.
usm02_cine_010: The Lithuanian government denounced a violation of its airspace and closed its frontiers with Belarus and Russia
usm02_cine_020: Литовское правительство перекрыло весь автомобильный и железнодорожный транзит с Калининградом
usm02_cine_030: The Russian authorities have violently protested against what they call the blockade of Kaliningrad and placed their troops on high alert
usm02_cine_040: The unknown object that was shot down during the exercise turned out to be a Russian drone. The official line is that it was shot down to prevent an air collision with our jets training nearby. But the Russians refuse to go along with that story and maintain that it was flying on their side of the border.
usm02_cine_050: But it was flying on the wrong side of the border, right?
usm02_cine_060: Well it was hit in the Lithuanian airspace but ended up a few meters on the other side of the frontier, so as you can imagine they jumped on the occasion to create their own narrative.
usm02_cine_070: In any case the Lithuanian government has closed their borders with Belarus and Kaliningrad until the end of the investigations.
usm02_cine_080: As a response the Russians have placed all their troops at the border on high alert and sent a quote unquote: "military convoy carrying humanitarian aid to Kaliningrad." They are approaching the town of Lazdijai as we speak.
usm02_cine_090: And nobody thought about stopping them?!
usm02_cine_100: It's a tricky situation: the Lithuanians cannot block humanitarian convoys without breaking international treaties.
usm02_cine_110: Humanitarian my ass! We can't let that happen!
usm02_brief_010: This so-called humanitarian convoy is like spitting in our face! Williams, what are our units in the area?
usm02_brief_020: A Stryker company from 2nd cav is training nearby. If they move at once they should be able to intercept the convoy before it reaches the city of Lazdijai.
usm02_brief_030: This isn't much but it will have to do. Dispatch them immediately.
usm02_brief_040: General, don't you see what’s happening? The drone, the convoy, half the Russian army are on high alert on the other side of the frontier!
usm02_brief_050: This whole situation could very well be a false flag operation. If you rush into this convoy with blazing guns this would certainly give them a justification for a strong military response.
usm02_brief_060: They wouldn't dare! They are only testing our resolve. So we'll put ourselves in their way, make a show of force, and watch them go crawl back under their rock.
usm02_brief_070: And what will you do if they don't stop?
usm02_brief_090: The city of Lazdijai is a vital crossroad to reinforce Lithuania. If they take control of it we have no way to defend Vilnius in case of invasion. We cannot take the risk to let that happen!
usm02_brief_100: Sir, the stryker company responded, they are already in sight of Lazdijai and are awaiting orders.
usm02_brief_110: Thank you Major. Let’s go Commander, we have a lot on our plate.
usm02_intel_01:
Stryker MGS (Mobile Gun System)
They provide direct fire support with their 105mm gun. They are very efficient against infantry and light vehicles but carry a limited ammount of rounds.
usm02_intel_02:
Stryker ICV (Infantry Carrying Vehicle)
They can carry up to 9 soldiers and are equipped with Javelin anti-tank missiles in addition to the heavy machine gun for this mission.
usm02_intel_03:
Stryker RV (Recon Vehicle)
They have long range optics and the ability to designate targets with their laser. Armament comprises a 30mm autocannon and Javelin missiles.
usm02_intel_04:
Stryker ATGMV (Anti-Tank Guided Missile Vehicle)
They carry 12 long range TOW missiles.
The 4 missiles with HE (High Explosive) warhead can be used against both light vehicles and infantry.
usm02_intel_05: MTV Trucks carry up to 16 soldiers or/and supplies. The quantity of supplies that can be transported is reduced when infantry is carried.
usm02_hint_01_text:
- Press H or the return fire button to order your troops to engage only if fired upon.
- You can see which unit is in hold fire mode thanks to the icon on the label.
usm02_hint_02_text: This aircraft can autonomously detect and engage ground targets located within its flight orbit.
usm02_dial_0010: The convoy has been spotted a few miles down this highway sir.
usm02_dial_0020: No time to lose then! This crossroad is the last position where we can stop them before they reach the city. Send your troops there immediately Commander.
usm02_dial_0030: The convoy is approaching, we're tracking its position with a drone.
usm02_dial_0040: Hurry up, capture the crossroad before they reach it.
usm02_dial_0050: Remember, this is officially a humanitarian convoy and unless proven otherwise it must be considered as such. Act with extreme caution here General.
usm02_dial_0060: Yeah of course! Commander, make sure our troops are instructed to hold their fire and engage only if fired upon.
usm02_dial_0070: We are holding the crossroad general. They are approaching rapidly, maybe they didn't see us. Shall we fire a warning shot?
usm02_dial_0080: Negative, hold your fire and stay in the middle of the road. Show them we are here and they'll back off.
usm02_dial_0110: I guess they were not expecting us!
usm02_dial_0120: Come on, now is the moment of truth! Either they go back or they try to pass in force.
usm02_dial_0140: Thank God we won't have a war on our hands today! Congratulations General, I have to admit I didn’t think it would be that easy.
usm02_dial_0150: No wait! They turned left, what are they doing?
usm02_dial_0160: Ha! They are trying another approach to bypass us. Commander, redeploy your troops on these crossroads. Show them we're not here by accident.
usm02_dial_0170: Don't forget to call reinforcements, we'll need all the help we can get to cover all these crossing points.
usm02_dial_0190: Enemy soldiers have dismounted from the trucks and start moving in our direction!
usm02_dial_0200: We got positive identification of weapons! I repeat PID of weapons!
usm02_dial_0210: Hold your fire! This is a game of chicken: whoever shoots first takes the blame.
usm02_dial_0220: And whoever gets shot first dies!
usm02_dial_0185: Williams, drop a bomb on the road in front of them as a warning, we must show where our red line stands.
usm02_dial_0230: Our drone has been shot down!
usm02_dial_0240: It's clear they're not coming to shake hands! You're authorized to engage Commander!
usm02_dial_0250: What happened?! Why did your men open fire?! Your instructions were not to engage!
usm02_dial_0260: You're not the one on the ground assessing the situation Miller! The commander certainly had his reasons. His first duty is to ensure the safety of his men.
usm02_dial_0261:
Their aim was clearly to push us into a corner and you fell for it like a fool.
You have no idea of the shitstorm you've just stirred up!
usm02_dial_0270: Armed vehicles are detaching from the bulk of the convoy and are moving up in our direction. Prepare for an assault!
usm02_dial_0280: Establish defensive positions in the buildings near the crossroads on our flank commander, and make sure our troops are resupplied.
usm02_dial_0290: If one of these positions is overwhelmed, fall back on the main crossroad and hunker down there.
usm02_dial_0300: I scramble jets to provide fire support, but they won't be there for 30 minutes. Your orders are simple: hold at all cost until they arrive.
usm02_dial_0310: Your men will never hold that long. Give me a minute, we have a pair of AC-130 gunships in the area, I will demand they be re-routed in your direction.
usm02_dial_0320: We? Who are you actually working with now Miller?
usm02_dial_0330: Just use the planes and dont ask questions. They will be there in about 10 minutes.
usm02_dial_0340: Our flank is starting to crumble. You can abandon ground to gain time commander but make sure you keep control of the main crossroad.
usm02_dial_0350: Our flank is completely overwhelmed. Miller, if you think you can try a diplomatic approach to convince them to return to Russia, now would be the time!
usm02_dial_0360: Enemy units are pouring through the main crossroad, eliminate them and retake it immediately!
usm02_dial_0370: We have lost the main crossroad, it’s over commander, evacuate your troops from the area. Minimizing our losses is the best we can do now.
usm02_dial_0380: The Stryker brigade is completely decimated and the Russian troops have free reign over the Suwalki gap. What a fiasco! What a humiliation!
usm02_dial_0390: Be advised Commander, a second wave of vehicles has forced the border and is approaching on the highway, they are accompanied by self propelled howitzers this time.
usm02_dial_0400: Static defenses will be hammered by their artillery so use the mobility of the strykers to avoid their fire.
usm02_dial_0410: Their artillery fires volley after volley without repositioning. Sadly our mortars lack the range to provide counter-battery without exposing themselves.
usm02_dial_0420: They're just asking to be beaten! Williams, contact the Lithuanian artillery battery that was training with the strykers. Those PzH-2000s will come in handy.
usm02_dial_0440: Sir, the Lithuanian artillery responded, one of their platoon is already on its way. You can call it as reinforcement Commander.
usm02_dial_0450: It sounds like their guns have been silenced at last.
usm02_dial_0460: The cavalry has arrived Commander! The gunships are here to support you. Move them over enemy positions and enjoy the show!
usm02_dial_0470: Could you please pay a bit more attention to these planes Commander? They aren’t exactly cheap, you know!
usm02_dial_0480: The Russian troops seem to be falling back, it looks like they had enough for today.
usm02_dial_0490: That was a close shave! The Stryker brigade is in poor shape and needs to be withdrawn. But they bought us precious time to organize our next move. Congratulations commander.
usm02_dial_0500: No time for congratulations. Reports indicate Russian penetrations on all the main axes leading to the 3 capital cities of the Baltic states. So there you have it, General, your long-awaited war.
usm02_dial_0510: The situation is getting dire here Miller! When are those planes coming?
usm02_dial_0520: Almost there, just hold a few more minutes.
usm02_dial_0530: A handful of Lithanian units have arrived and will hold the outskirts of the town on our left. Fall back on the main crossroad and hunker down there to receive the main Russian assault.
usm02_dial_0540: Our position is overwhelmed, retreat into the city outskirts and try to survive until the gunships arrive!
usm02_dial_0541: Our position is overwhelmed, retreat into the city outskirts and use the gunships to repel the assault!
usm02_dial_0550: Is this a joke Commander?! You have let this convoy pass right under your nose! You should start looking for a new job because I can guarantee you that your military carrier is over!
usm02_dial_0560: The convoy is almost at the crossroad and you still don't hold it! What are you doing? Capture it now!
usm02_medal_1_c1: Finish the mission in any difficulty level
usm02_medal_2_c1: Finish the mission in medium difficulty or higher
usm02_medal_3_c1: Finish the mission in hard difficulty
usm03a_desc: Assault the port of Baltiysk from the sea.
usm03a_task:
- Neutralize the anti-air battery
- Neutralize the coastal artillery
- Hold until relieved
usm03a_hint: Artillery takes time to aim, so don't let it zero in on your position and keep moving!
usm03a_cine_010: Gentlemen, we've just received the green light for the landing operation on Baltiysk peninsula.
usm03a_cine_020: The Russian Baltic fleet is currently resupplying in the harbor of Kaliningrad and will soon be ready to take to sea.
usm03a_cine_030: Taking control of this peninsula would trap them in the lagoon, rendering them basically non-operational in the region.
usm03a_cine_040: Our troops are ready to storm the beach but according to our latest satellite data, a mobile coastal artillery battery is defending the harbor.
usm03a_cine_050: These guns must be silenced before we can launch the main assault or this will turn into Omaha beach 2.0.
usm03a_cine_060: The guns have been spotted here. This is a battery of Bereg 130mm howitzers. They can detect and engage fast moving targets above the water. That includes ships and helicopters.
usm03a_cine_070: Local intel reports that a battery of Surface to air missiles is present on the south bank of the lagoon but the precise position of each launcher is unknown as they are relocated every day. That makes a missile or air strike way too hazardous.
usm03a_cine_080: Our best option is to send in a light force to eliminate the anti-air batteries by surprise and open the way for the main landing.
usm03a_cine_090: They don’t expect that kind of attack so the ground forces in the area are limited.
usm03a_cine_100: Commander, you will be in charge of this raid while I organize the main landing.
usm03a_cine_110: Prepare your troops but remember: It’s a one time opportunity so it’s make or break. Make it happen commander, good luck!
usm03a_brief_010: Commander, I've gathered as much information as possible about the operating forces in the region. You can consult them in the Mission Intel section if you wish.
usm03a_brief_020: May I have a word Commander? In private please.
usm03a_brief_030: It’s about the General. I know you hold him in high esteem, but you haven't known him as long as I have.
usm03a_brief_040: The truth is, he is a dangerous man. He's getting old and this conflict might be his last chance to fulfill his dreams of seeing his name in the history books.
usm03a_brief_050: That makes him dangerous. For you and your men, for himself, for everyone.
usm03a_brief_060: Books are full of great battles and proud generals. But never talk about the men who worked towards avoiding such glorious slaughters.
usm03a_brief_070: So when the day comes, and it will come, believe me, to choose between reason and glory, I'm counting on you Commander, to make the right choice.
usm03a_intel_marines:
Marines
A 13-man strong squad equipped with rifles, grenade launchers and AT4 light anti-tank rocket launchers.
usm03a_intel_recon:
Force Recon
A 6-man reconnaissance squad with better optics and stealth than regular combat squads.
usm03a_intel_raiders:
Marine Raiders
Elite close quarter fighters able to clear buildings in no time. They carry M72 anti-infantry rocket launchers and grenade launchers.
usm03a_intel_caat:
CAAT (Combined Anti-Armor Team)
A support squad equipped with Javelin anti-tank missiles as well as medium and heavy machine guns.
usm03a_intel_aavp:
AAVP-7A1 (Assault Amphibious Vehicle Personnel)
Large but lightly armored transport carring up to 21 marines. It is armed with a M2 heavy machine gun and a Mk19 automatic grenade launcher.
usm03a_intel_lav25:
LAV-25 (Light Armored Vehicle)
Fast amphibious recon vehicle equipped with a 25mm Bushmaster autocannon. Can carry up to 6 marines.
usm03a_intel_lavl:
LAV-L (Logistics)
A version of the LAV with limited armament to make room for 2500kg of supplies.
usm03a_intel_lavm:
LAV-M (Mortar)
The rear compartment holds a 80mm mortar with short range but high rate of fire. 100 rounds of ammunition are carried split between explosive and smoke rounds.
usm03a_intel_lavad:
LAV-AD (Air Defense)
Dedicated to anti-aircraft duty with 8 ready to fire Stinger missiles. The 25mm gatling gun is also efficiently against infantry and light vehicles.
usm03a_hint_01_text: You have access to ground reinforcements. Air and naval reinforcements will be unlocked later.
usm03a_hint_02_text: This warship can support you with its 127mm gun and Tomahawk cruise missiles.
usm03a_hint_lcac:
LCAC (Landing Craft Air Cushion)

These hovercrafts available in the SPE (special) tab can transport up to 70 tons of equipment which is enough to transport Abrams tanks ashore.
usm03a_choice_goleft: Attack the VDV landing zone first
usm03a_medal_1_condition: Kill the MLRS with cruise missiles
usm03a_medal_3_condition: Capture the fort in less than 10 minutes
usm03a_dial_0010: The ships cannot approach as long as the coastal battery located in this fort is operational.
usm03a_dial_0020: The anti-air missiles are located on the other side of the canal. A Russian missile battery generally consists of 6 launchers. 2 of them have been located on the beach but the others must be hiding in the nearby city.
usm03a_dial_0030: Sir, the reconnaissance group has made contact with the enemy and reports the presence of a tank platoon defending the area. I hope you brought some dedicated anti-tank units with you.
usm03a_dial_0040: The reinforcements you've requested are assembling steadily. Deploy them when needed on the battlefield.
usm03a_dial_0045: The troops have engaged the enemy, it will take them a little time to figure out what's going on but we've got to hurry now.
usm03a_dial_0060: The entire tank platoon has been destroyed, good job!
usm03a_dial_0073: That missile launcher is gone. Good!
usm03a_dial_0080: That was the last anti-aircraft launcher! The way is clear for the planes, I'm sending in an air raid to deal with the artillery.
usm03a_dial_0090: Coastal artillery destroyed. Now take that fort and establish a defensive perimeter. Enemy paratroopers are mobilizing for a counter attack as we speak.
usm03a_dial_0100: A platoon of naval infantry has been spotted crossing the canal. Prepare for a counter offensive.
usm03a_dial_0110: Air assets are now available Commander. You can call in helicopters from the reinforcements panel.
usm03a_dial_0120: The ships are on their way. Your orders are to hold your position until the arrival of the landing party.
usm03a_dial_0130: Those high-rises overlooking the fort will make our positions indefensible if enemy troops take them. We should hold those buildings as long as we can.
usm03a_dial_0140: The high-rises have fallen into the hands of the enemy. They can guide artillery on us from there. We’re gonna have a bad time if you don’t retake those buildings fast.
usm03a_dial_0141: The high-rises have fallen into the hands of the enemy. They can shoot missiles and guide artillery on to you from there. Stand by, I'm calling in an air raid to level these buildings.
usm03a_dial_0142: The fireworks are over, try to take back the buildings now. We've remodeled a little - let me know what you think!
usm03a_dial_0150: The landing party is almost there. Hold tight!
usm03a_dial_0160: The landing party is finally here, time for the big show!
usm03a_dial_0169: The enemy paratroopers have taken off and will be on you any minute now.
usm03a_dial_0170: This is it! The enemy paratroopers are here!
usm03a_dial_0180: The fort is falling into enemy hands, retake it immediately!
usm03a_dial_0190: Sir! Our troops at the fort have been overwhelmed, the few remaining survivors have surrendered.
