usm03a_dial_0200: We have no choice but to continue the assault, the ships are already on their way so we cannot go back now.
usm03a_dial_0210:
Here is the situation commander: your group holding the fort has drawn the enemy to the tip of the peninsula.
Our landing party is ready to flank them, trap them, and finish them off!
usm03a_dial_0220: Our landing crafts and helicopters give us the ability to strike anywhere on the coast. But we have a limited amount of troops and bringing reinforcements ashore will take time, so you need to define your priorities.
usm03a_dial_0230: The city garrison is still in disarray. Seizing the city center immediately without giving them time to reorganize would make the task much simpler.
usm03a_dial_0240: The enemy paratroopers have dropped the bulk of their equipment in the fields to the north of the town. They need to regroup for a while, but will soon be ready to attack. Striking them first would save us some trouble.
usm03a_dial_0250: And you need to hurry Commander, your men at the fort won't hold forever!
usm03a_dial_0251: Here is the situation commander: the loss of the fort will greatly complicate your task.
usm03a_dial_0252:
The enemy paratroopers have dropped the bulk of their equipment in the fields to the north of the town.
You need to clear this landing zone to prevent the arrival of even more airborne reinforcements.
usm03a_dial_0253: The city garrison is regrouping to push us back to the sea. Attacking first before they reach critical mass might be our best option.
usm03a_dial_0254: Your choice Commander, but one thing is certain: this will be bloody. Prepare for Omaha Beach 2.0
usm03a_dial_0260: We need to hurry Commander, our men at the fort can’t hold out much longer.
usm03a_dial_0270: Rocket barrage incoming, keep your heads down!
usm03a_dial_0280: A second MLRS battery is targeting us. Get covered!
usm03a_dial_0290: Is that how you welcome all your tourists around here?
usm03a_dial_0291: We have detected the origin of the strike, a few cruise missiles from our destroyer will teach them some manners!
usm03a_dial_0300: Enemy GRADs destroyed. So who's got the biggest stick now ?
usm03a_dial_0310: Another MLRS position destroyed! The entire battery should be gone now.
usm03a_dial_0320: We've linked up with the Marines holding the fort. There are many wounded requiring treatment but those in good shape are eager to continue the fight with us.
usm03a_dial_0330: Death or glory, that’s the spirit!
usm03a_dial_0340: Sir, the enemy landing zone has been secured.
usm03a_dial_0350: Perfect, without airborne reinforcement the peninsula is certain to fall into our hands. It’s just a matter of time.
usm03a_dial_0360: Now eliminate the garrison defending the city center but be careful: by now they will be waiting for us.
usm03a_dial_0370: The city center is under our control General.
usm03a_dial_0380: Good, but our position will remain precarious as long as the enemy paratroopers are able to reinforce the peninsula.
usm03a_dial_0390: Secure their landing zone but be careful: they've had enough time to assemble a substantial battle group.
usm03a_dial_0395: Our men at the fort are still under heavy enemy assault, go get them now while there is still someone to save!
usm03a_dial_0400: All the objectives have been reached, congratulations Commander.
usm03a_dial_0410: I will recommend all the soldiers who fought at the fort for a medal. These men are heroes.
usm03a_dial_0420: I will recommend all the soldiers who died at the fort for a posthumous award. Those men died as heroes.
usm03a_dial_0430: I will assist you with my group Commander, where do you want me to go?
usm03b_desc: Take control of Chkalovsk air base with an airdrop.
usm03b_task:
- Suppress the enemy air defense
- Conduct an airborne assault
- Secure the runway
usm03b_hint: Infantry on their own will be hard pressed to combat armored vehicles. Use the air-droppable fire support and transport vehicles at your disposal to increase your firepower and mobility.
usm03b_cine_010: Chkalovsk naval air base, 5 miles northwest of Kaliningrad, this is our target.
usm03b_cine_020: The city will be a tough nut to crack so we need to seize key infrastructure to reinforce our logistic line first.
usm03b_cine_030: So our objective is to capture this base with the runway intact.
usm03b_cine_040: The 82nd airborne division is preparing for the assault. But the air defense of the base must be suppressed first.
usm03b_cine_050: Planes equipped with anti-radiation missiles will open the way. And once it’s done, the paratroopers will make their jump and establish a defensive perimeter.
usm03b_cine_060: From there we can airlift heavier equipment and begin the siege of the city.
usm03b_brief_010: Sir, the Paratroopers are ready for the drop.
usm03b_brief_030: F-16s equipped with AGM-88 anti-radiation missiles will open the way and suppress the enemy air defense.
usm03b_brief_040: And the rest of the planes I have requested?
usm03b_brief_050: Strike planes will be available as reinforcement as soon as the SEAD mission is over.
usm03b_brief_060: A-10s to hunt enemy vehicles, F-35 equipped with guided bombs and F-15E carrying cluster munitions in case large enemy formations are spotted.
usm03b_brief_070: Perfect, the paras cannot hold on their own against tanks so they will need this support.
usm03b_brief_080: We also have B-1B supersonic bombers on standby.
usm03b_brief_090: What’s the point? Our objective is to capture this base, not to plow the runway with carpet bombs.
usm03b_brief_100: In case you fail General. I prefer to see this base erased from the map rather than letting the Russians keep it.
usm03b_brief_110: There will be no failure. Let's go Commander, we got a mission to succeed.
usm03b_intel_sead: Anti-radiation missiles are automatically fired at enemy anti-aircraft units with activated radar.
usm03b_intel_c130: C-130 can airdrop troops, vehicles and equipment from low or high altitude.
usm03b_intel_maverick: Laser guided missiles are fired automatically at enemy units painted with a laser. They are also fired at any visible target during strafe attacks.
usm03b_intel_cluster: Cluster bombs deal less damage than standard bombs but over a larger radius. They are also highly effective in disabling vehicles.
usm03b_intel_airborne: Equipped with "Next Generation Squad Weapons" M7 rifles and M250 machine guns, they benefit from a higher range than comparable infantry sqauds.
usm03b_intel_weapons: The weapons squad regroups 2 medium machine gun teams and 2 Javelin anti-tank teams into a single unit.
usm03b_intel_stt: Special Tactics Teams are the Air Force special forces equipped with powerful long range rifles and stinger missiles.
usm03b_intel_sheridan: This airdropable tank can defeat entrenched infantry with its 152mm gun but only has paper armor.
usm03b_intel_brutus: A 155mm howitzer mounted on a MTV truck chassis, airdroppable from C-130.
usm03b_intel_avenger: An airdropable anti-aircraft system firing stinger missiles, mounted on Humvee chassis.
usm03b_intel_drone: RQ-7 Shadows are small unarmed drones providing reconnaissance.
usm03b_hint_01_text:
- Select a cargo plane in the reinforcements
- Load it with infantry and airdropable vehicles
- Validate the airdrop command with a [LMB] drag and drop on the map.
usm03b_hint_02_text: Drones are particularly useful to survey large areas.
usm03b_hint_03_text: Planes flying at low altitude are detected later by ground radars and other planes flying low.
usm03b_medal_2_condition: Don't lose a single plane during the operation
usm03b_medal_3_condition: Finish the mission in less than 30min
usm03b_dial_0010: Special tactics teams have located the anti-air missiles around the airfield.
usm03b_dial_0020: S-300 missiles and anti aircraft guns can intercept missiles when their radar is active.
usm03b_dial_0030: The recommended course of action is to approach from low altitude and to send a high number of SEAD planes at once to overwhelm them.
usm03b_dial_0040: This is Zulu liner 1-1 entering the AO, jammers are ON, time to play them some music.
usm03b_dial_0050: Magnum! Missile away, radar destruction confirmed.
usm03b_dial_0060: No more radar emission detected, they are either destroyed or too afraid to turn them on now. Zulu liner out.
usm03b_dial_0070: Time to send in the airborne!
usm03b_dial_0080: Capture the control tower at the end of the runway, we will use this elevated position as an observation post to call in airstrikes.
usm03b_dial_0090: We don't have all day Commander, capture the control tower at the end of the runway!
usm03b_dial_0100:
To airdrop troops:
- Select a cargo plane in the reinforcements
- Load it with infantry and airdropable vehicles
- Cargo planes automatically airdrop troops where you call them
- You can also give the order manually if you want the plane to arrive from a different direction
usm03b_dial_0110: The first objective is in our hands.
usm03b_dial_0120: Enemy planes are trying to take off. Nail them down before they can escape. From now on this is a no fly zone for the enemy!
usm03b_dial_0130: I don't think any plane will try to take off after what happened to those 3.
usm03b_dial_0140: An enemy plane has managed to take off. You should send air patrols immediately before it comes back at us.
usm03b_dial_0150: A second plane has managed to take off. It will come back to us.
usm03b_dial_0160: Another plane has managed to take off. Prepare for another bombing strike.
usm03b_dial_0170: Our position is now identified, the security forces of the airbase are probably already on their way.
usm03b_dial_0180: Establish defensive positions but as soon as you have the chance, push out toward the middle of the runway and take control of the buildings there.
usm03b_dial_0181: We have lost control of our defensive position at the end of the runway. Retake it immediately!
usm03b_dial_0185: Our strike planes are ready to support you, don't hesitate to call them as reinforcements.
usm03b_dial_0190: The enemy attacks are coming from these barracks. Clear them to secure our flank.
usm03b_dial_0191: The enemy barracks have been secured Sir.
usm03b_dial_0192: Good, refocus your attention on your main objectives Commander.
usm03b_dial_0195: Helicopters are taking off from these helipads. Capture these hangars and nail them down!
usm03b_dial_0196: The helipads are under our control General.
usm03b_dial_0200: The airstrip is secured. Now let's move to our final objective, the command center of the airbase.
usm03b_dial_0210: We need to finish capturing this base before receiving the counter-attack that will surely fall upon us.
usm03b_dial_0220: We hold the airbase, but the garrison of Kaliningrad has assembled a large force to retake it. They took their sweet time but they are coming in force now.
usm03b_dial_0230: We can bring some heavy equipment with C-17 but we only have time for a single delivery so choose well.
usm03b_dial_0240: Which equipment should we load into the C-17 Commander?
usm03b_dial_0250: This was a one time delivery, you won't receive replacements for these units if you lose them so be careful.
usm03b_dial_0260: Commander, the satellite imagery analysis reveals the possible presence of an Su-57 codename "Felon" stationed on in unknown area on this base.
usm03b_dial_0270: This is the most modern and secretive stealth plane operated by Russia. Getting our hands on an intact airframe would be invaluable.
usm03b_dial_0280: More valuable than the lives of our men obviously. We're in the middle of an assault here, not playing treasure hunt.
usm03b_dial_0290: There is more than one way to win wars, and knowing your enemy is one of them. You should look for this plane before they destroy it Commander.
usm03b_dial_0291: The most likely position would be in one of the many aircraft shelters surrounding the base. But that's like looking for a needle in a haystack!
usm03b_dial_0292: The Sukhoi-57 has been destroyed. To fail so close to the goal, this is infuriating.
usm03b_dial_0293: The recovery team has been shot down, I'm sending a second helicopter, make sure they reach the Sukhoi 57 this time Commander.
usm03b_dial_0294: The second helicopter has been shot down as well Commander!
usm03b_dial_0295: Doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results... Stop wasting your men's lives for this stupid plane Miller, we will secure it later once the base is ours.
usm03b_dial_0296: Alright, maintain a perimeter around the plane. Make sure it stays undamaged.
usm03b_dial_0297: Okay, my guys have lifted the Sukhoi 57 and are on their way back.
usm03b_dial_0298: The helicopter transporting the Sukhoi-57 has been destroyed. To fail so close to the goal, this is infuriating.
usm03b_dial_0299: The Su-57 has been retrieved, I can't wait to know if it's as good as they claim, or if the story of the Mig-25 will repeat itself.
usm03b_dial_0300: We couldn't find any trace of the Sukhoi 57, I think we can safely assume that it has been either moved to another location or that it was never there in the first place.
usm03b_dial_0310: Counselor Miller! We have found the Sukoi 57! It seems to be in perfect shape.
usm03b_dial_0320: Wonderful, I am sending a group to retrieve it immediately, keep the position secured until they arrive.
usm03b_dial_0330: Counselor Miller, we have found the Sukoi 57... or what's left of it.
usm03b_dial_0340: It's been destroyed, and I don't think we'll be able to salvage much from this pile of smoking debris.
usm03b_dial_0350: Well, congratulations Commander, a beautiful opportunity wasted!
usm03b_dial_0360: Fighting the enemy group head on with our light units would be suicidal, you should setup a defensive perimeter, spot them as soon as possible then unleash our air power on them.
usm03b_dial_0370: Sir, we have detected the enemy group. They're not kidding this time, dozens of tanks and IFVs in combat formation.
usm03b_dial_0380: Alright, maintain visual on them and send in the air force. Cluster bombs are perfect to damage vehicles. Once they are immobilized they are as good as dead.
usm03b_dial_0390: It's over, all the vehicles are burning or abandoned. What's left of the infantry and the crews is fleeing in disarray. So many losses at once, that must be terrifying.
usm03b_dial_0410: That was a brilliant victory today Commander. The noose is tightening around Kaliningrad and I'm sure they can feel it.
usm03c_desc: Punch through toward Kaliningrad with an armored fist.
usm03c_task:
- Open the road with your armored group
- Keep the road open for the rest of the brigade
usm03c_hint: Vehicles can be regroupped to form an armored fist and engage isolated infantry units one by one with superior firepower, destroying them before they can strike back.
usm03c_cine_010: The city of Kaliningrad is only 20 miles away from the Polish border. In your opinion, General, how long would it take an armored brigade to reach it?
usm03c_cine_020: Using highway E28 they could cover this distance in less than a day for sure. But our tanks are stored in Germany and won't be here for several days. And last time I checked you told me the Poles won’t intervene.
usm03c_cine_030: Indeed, they won’t enter Russian soil without first ensuring full support from the rest of the EU. But what if I convinced them to lend us some of their newly acquired Abrams tanks?
usm03c_cine_040: Well that changes everything, our crews have already been airlifted from Germany and are waiting for their machines. We’re talking hours, not days this time.
usm03c_cine_050: Then consider it done. I’ll make the necessary arrangements.
usm03c_brief_020: The first Polish tanks have been transferred to our crews but it will take several days to reach full capacity.
usm03c_brief_040: The Russians seem pretty disorganized as well. There is a lot of movement but nothing very coordinated.
usm03c_brief_050: Then we won't give them time to come to their senses. We will act immediately and seize the initiative to keep them off balance.
usm03c_brief_060: Williams, organize an ad hoc Armor Company Team with whatever you can find.
usm03c_brief_070: Commander, you will lead this armored spearhead and open the way to Kaliningrad for the rest of our forces. Rush forward, don’t stop at anything, don’t even slow down, and ram through the tollgate!
usm03c_intel_aps:
Active Protection Systems (APS)
They fire an explosive charge or shrapnell at incoming projectiles to intercept them.
Only efficient against slow projectiles equipped with shaped charges like infantry's RPGs and ATGMs.
usm03c_intel_abrams:
M1A2 SEPv3 Abrams
The most modern version of the tank equipped with additional armor and Trophy active protection system.
usm03c_intel_bradley:
M2A4 Bradley Fighting Vehicle
A powerfully armed troops transport equipped with an autocannon, anti-tank missiles, and upgraded with Active Protection System.
usm03c_intel_cfv:
M3A4 Cavalry Fighting Vehicle
Recon variant of the bradley with advanced optics. The troops transport capacity has been reduced to 3 men to carry more TOW missiles.
usm03c_hint_01_text: Your units can use supplies from allied forces. You can also load your cargo vehicles with supplies owned by allies.
usm03c_medal_1_condition: Provide safe passage to the column
usm03c_dial_0010: We're approaching the border. We have received reports of Russian troops establishing defensive positions along the highway.
usm03c_dial_0020: Don't give them time to reinforce their positions Commander, move quickly and secure the first checkpoint rapidly.
usm03c_dial_0030: No sign of enemy presence at checkpoint Alpha Sir.
usm03c_dial_0040: Good, we beat them to the punch.
usm03c_dial_0050: Williams, establish a supply point here. Make sure we have a constant flow of ammunition and spare parts to keep up the pace.
usm03c_dial_0070: Commander, continue towards the next checkpoints.
usm03c_dial_0080: Our vehicles are equipped with active protection systems designed to intercept incoming missiles and RPGs, so don’t hesitate to jump into the middle of the fray. Shock and awe!
usm03c_dial_0090: One of our vehicles has been destroyed Commander!
usm03c_dial_0100: Active protection systems are no magic shields; they can be overwhelmed if several missiles hit in quick succession and they have a limited number of charges.
usm03c_dial_0110: You can replenish your APS and smoke grenades at the supply depots I'm setting up along the highway.
usm03c_dial_0120: Checkpoint Bravo is under our control Sir, enemy defense eliminated.
usm03c_dial_0130: Perfect! Keep up the pace Commander, Williams will set up resupply points at each checkpoint as you progress.
usm03c_dial_0140: Take what you need to rearm your units but be quick, the more you wait the stronger the enemy defense will be.
usm03c_dial_0150: Checkpoint Charlie is under our control sir.
usm03c_dial_0160: The latest SIGINT report indicates small enemy groups assembling on both sides of the highway.
usm03c_dial_0170: Williams, set up reconnaissance positions on our flanks, I don't want any surprises.
usm03c_dial_0200: One more checkpoint and the road to Kaliningrad will be open Commander.
usm03c_dial_0210: Sir, the activity on our flanks is starting to worry me. Several of my positions have been probed which could indicate an imminent attack.
usm03c_dial_0220: It could also be isolated units trying to find their way. No need to over react.
usm03c_dial_0230: Our priority remains to capture the last checkpoint. An armored brigade is preparing to move as we speak. As soon as the road is open I will send them through.
usm03c_dial_0250: Finally! Kaliningrad, here we come! The brigade is in marching order and ready to go, I'm giving them the order to move immediately.
usm03c_dial_0260: Sir, our flanks are still threatened and my troops can't hold on their own! My defenses around checkpoint Charlie are being probed again.
usm03c_dial_0270: I know! I know! Commander, use your troops to assist Williams now. Make sure we keep control of the Highway and ensure safe passage to the vehicles of the armored brigade.
usm03c_dial_0271: I'm assigning you a pair of Apache helicopters to provide overwatch. Make sure the column of vehicles reaches checkpoint echo without taking losses.
usm03c_dial_0280: Sir, a large enemy group has been spotted on our flank heading towards checkpoint Charlie.
usm03c_dial_0290: My reconnaissance units won’t be able to hold them back for long, I need backup!
usm03c_dial_0300: Understood. Commander, send back some of your troops to assist Williams. Keep the pressure on the enemy if you can but pause the assault if necessary. Our logistic line must not be severed.
usm03c_dial_0310: Sir, we have detected at least one large enemy group heading toward checkpoint Echo and I'm waiting for confirmation on two potential other groups.
usm03c_dial_0320: It looks like they are sending everything they have left. Hold tight Major!
usm03c_dial_0330: Head back towards checkpoint Echo as soon as you can Commander, this armored column must keep moving. Stopping now would turn it into a gigantic Piñata for a tactical nuke.
usm03c_dial_0340: The armored column is under attack, you must protect it!
usm03c_dial_0350: A vehicle from the column has been destroyed, they need your help over here Commander!
usm03c_dial_0360: T-72 tanks are no match for our Abrams. But keep your distance, a close-range shot will still pierce through our armor.
usm03c_dial_0370: The full brigade is on its way to Kaliningrad. I cannot wait to see this armored fist knocking at the gates of the city.
usm03c_dial_0380: And all that with minimal losses under your command, that's impressive!
usm03c_dial_0390: The brigade has sustained losses but is finally on its way to Kaliningrad._x000b_Let's hope that what's left of it will be enough to punch through the defenses of city.
usm03c_dial_0400:
How comes you didn't lose a single vehicle while the brigade has sustained losses Commander?
You were supposed to protect the column, not to hide behind it!
usm03c_dial_0401: Luckily your group is pretty much intact and will be able to compensate for those losses.
usm03c_dial_0402: But I see that you didn't hang around and sustained losses too. I guess you did your best and we get what we get Commander.
usm03c_dial_0410: Our logistic line is severed Commander! Regain control over the checkpoints immediately!
usm03c_dial_0420: Our control over the highway is threatened again Commander. Take back the checkpoints immediately!
usm03c_dial_0430: Enemy units have taken back one of the checkpoints. We need to keep control of all of them!
usm03c_dial_0440: The checkpoint is secured again Sir
usm03c_dial_0450: Good! Now make sure that you keep control of the highway.
usm03c_dial_0460: We have regained control over all the checkpoints Sir
usm03c_dial_0470: Alright! Make sure that you keep control of the highway now.
usm03c_dial_0480: The column is on the move and has reached checkpoint alpha Sir.
usm03c_dial_0481: The combat potential of this armored brigade must be maintained until it reaches Kaliningrad. So make sure there are no enemy units in its way.
usm03c_dial_0490: The column has reached checkpoint bravo Sir.
usm03c_dial_0491: Hunt down the remaining enemy groups roaming around checkpoint Charlie Commander. Keep the column safe.
usm03c_dial_0500: The column has reached checkpoint charlie Sir.
usm03c_dial_0501: Good, don't let the column overtake you Commander. Use the secondary roads on the sides of the highway to avoid getting stuck in traffic.
usm03c_dial_0510: The column has reached checkpoint delta Sir.
usm03c_dial_0511: Numerous enemies are converging on checkpoint Echo Commander. Don't let them reach the highway. Use your troops as a buffer.
usm03c_dial_0520: The column has finally reached checkpoint echo Sir.
usm03c_dial_0521: One last push and we're there! Don't let the enemy hit it now, that would be so stupid to fail so close to reaching our goal.
usm04_desc: Delta Force operators are sent to Kaliningrad.
usm04_task:
- Use the river as a route of approach
- Find and neutralize the target
- Everyone gets back home before sunrise
usm04_hint: Don't fly over enemy infantry, they can use their anti-tank rockets against helicopters at short range.
usm04_cine_010: We are at the gates of Kaliningrad but the situation in the East is getting critical. Vilnius has fallen and the Russian forces advancing from Belarus are pushing hard in our direction.
usm04_cine_020: We must rapidly subdue Kaliningrad before the Russian reinforcements can close the Suwalki gap and stab us in the back.
usm04_cine_030: Civilians have been evacuated and the garrison of the city is preparing for a long battle of attrition.
usm04_cine_040: They will have months worth of supplies and we don’t have time to lay a siege. We need to move east immediately.
usm04_cine_050: We need to break their morale. I have requested F/A-18's Hornet of the marines to be loaded with napalm.
usm04_cine_070: Rebrand them as much as you like, they will do the job just as well.
usm04_cine_080: A very cunning plan General. Although I have an alternative proposal that doesn't involve burning a century-old city to the ground. May I?
usm04_cine_090: The garrison is mainly composed of infantry on foot with the mechanized troops held in reserve as a reaction force.
usm04_cine_100: A simultaneous attack of our troops to the north and the south of the city would force them to send their reserves away from the city center.
usm04_cine_110: This would leave the enemy HQ vulnerable to a decapitation strike carried out by our special forces.
usm04_cine_120: We have traced the end point of communications sent to the Military Governor of the oblast commanding the garrison.
usm04_cine_130: Then let’s bomb the place to the ground and be done with it, no need to show-off with special forces.
usm04_cine_140: The end point is the basement of the House of Soviets. Probably the biggest brutalist-style cube of concrete ever built by the Soviet Union. Bombs won’t work.
usm04_cine_150: We will use the cover of night and follow the Pregolya river using our newest Silent Hawk stealth helicopters to approach undetected.
usm04_cine_160: A Delta Force team will assault the building, capture the Governor and force him to order the surrender of the garrison.
usm04_brief_010: This plan makes no sense, and has no chance to succeed. We proceed my way
usm04_brief_020: No General, we will proceed my way. The intercepted message has been deciphered and it gives the governor the power to use nukes should the city fall.
usm04_brief_030: The possibility of nukes being used makes it a threat to national security and so you have been placed under my command.
usm04_brief_040: Major Williams, hand over the signed order to the General please.
usm04_brief_050: Sorry general, the orders are clear.
usm04_brief_060: What is the meaning of this?! I am in command of all our forces in the Baltics, I'm not going to let some spook in a suit take command of my forces!
usm04_brief_070: You will General, or we will find someone else to do it in your place. That goes for you too Commander so I hope I can count on your full cooperation.
usm04_brief_100: Congratulations, you’ve just been promoted Lieutenant Colonel. You will be in charge of creating the distraction while my guys do their job.
usm04_brief_110: Commander, you will assist me on the planning and execution of this raid. Let’s go.
usm04_intel_delta:
Delta force
Close quarter specialists equipped with short range weapons and flashbangs instaneously panicking units in the buildings they enter.
usm04_intel_rangers:
Rangers
All rounder 9 man squad the RAWS anti-tank rocket launcher has a longer range than the usual AT4.
usm04_intel_maaws:
Ranger MAAWS
A 6 man team equipped with 3 rocket launchers. Vehicles entering their range generally don't last long.
usm04_intel_mk47:
Ranger Mk47 Striker
The Mk47 automatic grenade launcher shoots air-burst grenades able to engage ground targets and helicopters.
usm04_intel_ah6:
AH-6 Killer Egg
This helicopter doesn't have counter measures but is very agile and can easily hide between buildings.
usm04_intel_dap:
MH-60M DAP
The Direct Action Penetrator is the gunship version of the Blackhawk equipped with rockets and chainguns. It also retain the capacity to carry up to 6 soldiers.
usm04_hint_01_text: The reinforcements menu is now available. Send your empty helicopters back to base to get your money back.
usm04_hint_02_text: This ballistic missile can be guided by the laser of a sniper team or a drone.
usm04_task_escort: Escort team Delta to the target building.
usm04_task_search: Search the neighborhood for the target
usm04_medal_1_c2: Kill the target VIP with a sniper
usm04_medal_2_c2: Don't lose a single delta force squad
usm04_dial_0010: This is Delta actual, TonT 2 minutes, ready for final approach.
usm04_dial_0020:
Perfect.
Williams, you can start the assault to draw the enemy forces away from the river.
usm04_dial_0040: Commander, escort Delta Forces to the target building. Stay over the river to avoid detection.
usm04_dial_0050: Enemy comms in the harbor area are in full swing, you have been detected!
usm04_dial_0060: Copy, we rush toward the target building before our host has time to escape. Try to keep up Commander.
usm04_dial_0065: You seem to know those guys from the Delta Force pretty well Counselor, you've worked with them before, am I right?
usm04_dial_0066:
You really don't have the credentials to get this kind of information Williams. 
Focus on your objectives and try to look the other way as much as possible.
usm04_dial_0070: Shots fired, we have been detected.
usm04_dial_0080: It’s okay you’re almost there, proceed as planned
usm04_dial_0100:
Delta 1-1, enemy HQ under our control. Lots of supplies in here but no trace of the target so far.
Give us a few minutes to comb through the building.
usm04_dial_0110: Roger that, if he's not here he can't have gone far. Look for intel and search any alternative location where we might find him.
usm04_dial_0120: Commander, establish a defensive perimeter around the building. We have a lot of enemy movement converging on your location.
usm04_dial_0130: Delta 1-1, still no trace of the target but we found the command room in the basements.
usm04_dial_0140: Hey Williams! I've got a little something for you.....Just sent you a picture of all the enemy positions. Don't forget to thank me with a beer when I'm back
usm04_dial_0150: Try to come back in one piece already...
usm04_dial_0160: Do any of you speak Russian? We could try to radio the surrender order ourselves after all.
usm04_dial_0170: Huh… Ya niemogo gabayou pa roosky?
usm04_dial_0180: Okay forget about that, anything else?
usm04_dial_0190:
We found the entrance of a tunnel network in the basement. The target must have fled that way.
Radio comms will be out while we’re in there, see you on the other side. [Static]
usm04_dial_0200: The House of Soviets has been built on the ruins of the old Prussian castle; there could be miles and miles of tunnels under the city.
usm04_dial_0210: Commander, keep your position until the Deltas resurface.
usm04_dial_0220: In the meantime try to expand your perimeter. We never know, the guy could be hiding somewhere.
usm04_dial_0221: No trace of our man here, try another district.
usm04_dial_0222: No joy in this district, try another one.
usm04_dial_0223: Nothing in this district, the target might be somewhere else.
usm04_dial_0224: Another district searched and still no target, our chances to find him are shrinking.
usm04_dial_0225: No one's there. Where is this guy hiding goddamn it!?
usm04_dial_0226: All the surrounding districts have been searched and there is still no trace of the target. Shall we cancel the operation Sir?
usm04_dial_0227: Negative let's wait for all the the D-Boys to resurface, we won't leave without them anyway.
usm04_dial_0230: This is Delta 1-2 du you copy? Our tunnel exited in the crypt of the cathedral. No sign of the target.
usm04_dial_0240: Copy 1-2, where are the other groups?
usm04_dial_0250: We split to maximize the search area. They haven't made contact yet?
usm04_dial_0260: Negative, you’re the first group to resurface. Don't move, we're coming to get you.
usm04_dial_0270: Commander, link up with them and take them with your group.
usm04_dial_0280: Look who's here, boys. You don't mind if we come along Commander?
usm04_dial_0290: This is Delta 1-4, do you read?
usm04_dial_0300: 1-4, I read you, what’s your status?
usm04_dial_0310: No joy on the target, our tunnel led into the sewers. We’ve exited into a swampy puddle of shit next to the railway bridge.
usm04_dial_0320: Copy 1-4, hunker down, we will link up with you.
usm04_dial_0330: Roger, we'll take cover in the nearby warehouse. Fuck sake! I swear Russian shit stinks worse than ours!
usm04_dial_0340: Hey Commander, glad to see you. I hope you don't mind the smell.
usm04_dial_0350: This is Delta 1-3, Delta 1-3 reporting, do you copy?
usm04_dial_0370: We’ve reached the end of our tunnel. It leads to the basement of a building near the lake.
usm04_dial_0380: The target can't have come this way, the outer door was still locked from the inside.
usm04_dial_0390: Copy 1-3, stay where you are, we come to pick you up.
usm04_dial_0400: Hello there, do you mind if we join the party?
usm04_dial_0410: It’s too long Commander, we’re losing the initiative and Delta 1-1 is still underground somewhere.
usm04_dial_0460:
[Heavy static]
This is Delta 1-1, we’ve resurfaced near the Stadium, numerous hostiles detected, target presence confirmed, I repeat, target presence confirmed!
usm04_dial_0480: There is a little army around the stadium. They are loading trucks. It looks like they are prepping to move.
usm04_dial_0490: With all the stuff they have on the ground, we will be mauled if we attack on foot.
usm04_dial_0500: There are also several high end SHORAD systems so helicopters are a no go as well.
usm04_dial_0510: Don't worry, there is no need to get our hands dirty. Now that the target is out in the open, we will hit him with a precision strike.
usm04_dial_0520: Williams, transfer the control of the HIMARS to the Commander.
usm04_dial_0530: Here you go Commander, those precision strike missiles are pinpoint accurate and can be guided by laser in case the target is on the move.
usm04_dial_0540: Fire multiple at once in case one gets intercepted.
usm04_dial_0550: Delta 1-1, Kill confirmed, target turned into a smoking crater.
usm04_dial_0551: Delta 1-1, target down, kill confirmed. No need to spend millions on ballistic missiles when a $10 bullet will do.
usm04_dial_0560: Great job team, adapt and overcome, as usual. Pack up and RTB, the round’s on me.
usm04_dial_0570: Commander, the deltas are still waiting for you to link up with them.
usm04_dial_0580: Commander, the deltas are under attack. Go and help them!
usm04_dial_0590: A squad of Delta Force has been lost. Pay attention Commander, these are my guys!
usm04_dial_0600: Another Delta Force squad lost. Remind me never to entrust you with anything I hold dear.
usm04_dial_0610: And yet another squad of Deltas lost. The good news is you can't go any lower in my esteem now, Commander.
usm04_dial_0620: One bird down, repeat, bird down! Goddamn it, Commander! Helicopters are fragile, pay a bit more attention!
usm04_dial_0630: Another helicopter down! This is starting to stink Commander! Pull yourself together!
usm04_dial_0640: One more bird hit the ground! What are you doing Commander?!
usm04_dial_0650: Fuck me! Another helicopter down! Commander!
usm04_dial_0660: Wait, is that a Comanche helicopter? I thought they never passed the prototype phase.
usm04_dial_0670: After investing 7 billion in R&D you really think we would have left them to rot in a museum?
usm04_dial_0680: We have officially closed the program but finished the development with our black budget.
usm04_dial_0690: The HIMARS have been destroyed! Find another solution Commander but I want this guy dead, now!
usm04_dial_0700: Look, it's working, their troops are retreating from the harbor to counter attack my push.
_old_usm04_medal_2_c2: Don't lose a single delta force squad
_old_usm04_medal_3_c1: Finish the mission in hard difficulty
usm05n_desc: The Marine expeditionary unit is sent to Riga with General Bennet on board.
usm05n_task:
- Defend the ship
- Hide in the harbor
- Help the local resistance
usm05n_hint: Klaipeda is Lithuania's only deep sea harbor and a vital logistical hub in this war.
usm05n_cine_010: The Latvian National Armed Forces are focusing their defense around their capital city and are in dire need of any help we can send them.
usm05n_cine_020: The Marine Expeditionary Unit that seized Baltiysk is now sailing to Riga and I’ve been reassigned to lead this new task force.
usm05n_cine_030: A privilege which, of course, is not a dick move from Miller to cast me out as far away as possible from the front, where we have a real chance of kicking some Russian ass and keeping all the credit for himself. No it certainly isn’t!
usm05n_cine_050: 4 sea skimming Bogeys inbound north Sir, vector 205, straight at us, they’re coming fast!
usm05n_brief_020: I’m fine, I’m fine. Just a few scratches. Nothing to write home about.
usm05n_brief_030: What’s the status of your ships!
usm05n_brief_040: Our escort destroyer have been sent to the bottom, they have sustained multiple hits and went down with all hands before we could do anything.
usm05n_brief_050: The carrier didn’t get hit directly but has received a lot of shrapnel, many airframes that were on the deck are badly damaged, we have several ongoing fires and casualties including my second in command.
usm05n_brief_060: We won’t be able to sustain another attack like that and I’m sure those Tupolevs are already rearming to come back and finish us.
usm05n_brief_070: I've set course to Klaipeda, it’s the nearest deep sea harbor, we will blend in with the cargo ship and carry out repairs there.
usm05n_brief_080: Yeah good idea, stay there and don’t move.
usm05n_brief_090: It seems that wherever I send you things go to shit. So best to keep the phenomenon localized.
usm05n_brief_110: Commander, jump in the first helicopter and see what you can do to salvage the situation.
usm05n_brief_120: Be careful General, our latest reports indicate fighting between Russian troops arrived from Kaliningrad and the local Lithuanian troops within the city.
usm05n_intel_01:
F/A-18C Hornet
Single seater aircraft in air-superiority configuration equipped with longragne AIM-174 Gunslinger missiles, medium range AIM-120 and short rangne AIM-9 Sidewinder missiles.
usm05n_intel_02:
F/A-18D Hornet
Dual seater aircraft in multirole configuration equipped with a mix of air-to-air missiles and laser guided bombs.
usm05n_intel_03:
AV8B Harrier II Plus
Slow aircraft without afterburner equipped with Maverick anti-tank missiles and a laser designator to fire them without strafing run.
usm05n_intel_04:
AV8B Night Attack Harrier II
The older Night Attack version of hte Harrier has been equipped with Mk77 firebombs, perfect to clear buildings from infantry.
usm05n_intel_05:
Su-35S
Powerful Russian fighter jet dedicated to air combat.
usm05n_intel_06:
Su-25SM
Rather slow ground attack aircraft, generally equipped with misssiles and rocket pods.
usm05n_intel_07:
Su-24M2
Variable-sweep wing bomber able to reach supersonic speeds.
usm05n_intel_08:
SU-30SM
A multirole dual seater aircaft able to carry both air-to-air and air-to-ground armament.
usm05n_hint_01_text: The probability to be hit directly by a missile reduces with each decoy used. The ECM value of the plane increases the effect of the decoys.
usm05n_hint_02_text: When out of decoys, a plane’s chance of being directly hit is 100% minus its ECM value. Missiles can also be outrun: they accelerate briefly, then slow down over time.
usm05n_hint_03_text: When lured, missiles can still explode near the plane thanks to their proximity fuse, causing partial damage.
usm05n_medal_2_c2: Destroy 30 enemy units with planes ({var, KillCount}/30)
usm05n_medal_3_c2: The carrier must not take more than 50% damage
usm05n_dial_0010: Commander, you're here! We're in deep shit. Our targeting radar's been hit, our anti-missile defenses are down. Another attack from their planes and we're done for!
usm05n_dial_0020: We’re heading to the middle of the harbor to blend in with all those cargo ships. We need cover from your aircraft!
usm05n_dial_0040: Our ship’s gonna have more holes than Swiss cheese!
usm05n_dial_0050: This thing’s not a ship anymore, it’s a floating strainer! We’re leaking like crazy!
usm05n_dial_0060: Abandon Ship! I repeat, abandon ship!
usm05n_dial_0070: We're halfway there, keep your fighters loitering, Commander!
usm05n_dial_0080: We're almost there, don't let us down now. Keep patroling!
usm05n_dial_0090: Enemy contact on our screens, they’re flying low and slow. Must be Sukhoi-25 attack aircraft. Intercept them before they reach us, Commander!
usm05n_dial_0100: Our F/A-18Cs are equipped with air-to-air missiles, including the latest long-range Gunslingers.
usm05n_dial_0110: Enemy fast movers detected. Could be supersonic bombers or fighters, hard to tell. Stay sharp.
usm05n_dial_0120: A wave of helicopters is approaching! Slower aircraft like Harriers, equipped with short-range infrared missiles, are best suited to take them down.
usm05n_dial_0130: Using fast jets against helicopters forces them to maneuver dangerously close to the ground, increasing the risk of a crash, especially with the afterburners engaged.
usm05n_dial_0140: Another wave of planes incoming, shoot them down before they reach us!
usm05n_dial_0150: Sukoi-24 bombers heading our way! We're target practice for them, shoot them down!
usm05n_dial_0160: Alright, let's dock here. We’ll need to stay for a while to carry out repairs. In the meantime, let’s assist the Lithuanians in repelling the Russian assault on the city.
usm05n_dial_0170: The enemy has penetrated deep into the city, aiming to divide Lithuanian forces and neutralize them one section at a time. It’s a classic urban warfare tactic for securing a city.
usm05n_dial_0180: Let’s push them back beyond the outskirts by retaking control of these three key crossroads.
usm05n_dial_0190: Use your strike planes to support the ground forces in their progression.
usm05n_dial_0200: First crossroad secured. That's a good start, Commander. The Lithuanians will occupy it, continue your progression.
usm05n_dial_0210: Second crossroad secured. Good, keep up the pace!
usm05n_dial_0220: Third Crossroad secured. Finally! The Russian troops have been repeled, they are beaten down and won't be able to counter-attack unless they receive reinforcements.
usm05n_dial_0230: Thanks for your help Commander, I really thought we were done for.
usm05n_dial_0240: You've lost one crossroad, Commander! Retake it!
usm05n_dial_0250: They've taken one of the Crossroads back! Let them know we don't like to share, Commander!
usm05n_dial_0260: I think those Russians have not understood the message: this is OUR crossroad!
usm05s_desc: Take out the 152nd Missile Brigade stationed in Chernyakhovsk military base.
usm05s_task:
- Assist Williams in establishing anti-missile defenses
- Assault the base and take out the Iskander missiles
usm05s_hint: Due to their high velocity, ballistic missiles can only be intercepted by long-range surface-to-air missiles, and even then, only within a limited radius around the SAM launcher.
usm05s_cine_010: Kaliningrad is in our hands Counsellor. The entire garrison has surrendered and very few elements have managed to escape the encirclement.
usm05s_cine_020: Excellent, I knew I could count on you. And of course on your precious help commander.
usm05s_cine_030: Our last target in the region is the military base of Chernyakhovks hosting the 152nd Missile Brigade.
usm05s_cine_040: These are the Iskander short range ballistic missiles threatening Europe. So I’m sure our very careful allies would love to see them removed.
usm05s_cine_050: An entire brigade dedicated to ballistic missiles. We'd better cover up today, because it's going to be a downpour!
usm05s_brief_010: So, Lieutenant Colonel, what do you think would be the best course of action?
usm05s_brief_020: Ballistic missiles can strike anywhere but it takes time to configure and launch them.
usm05s_brief_030: We must absolutely stay dispersed and on the move to avoid becoming the target of a tactical nuke.
usm05s_brief_040: So we stay on their heels, get close enough to force them to use conventional warheads, set up a battery of Patriot to intercept a maximum of missiles, and start assaulting the base immediately.
usm05s_brief_050: You heard her Commander. No time to lose.
usm05s_intel_01:
MIM-104F Patriot PAC-3 MSE
Long range ani-aircraft unit able to intercept cruise and ballistic missiles. It can carry 4, 8 or 12 missiles depending on the configuration.
usm05s_intel_02:
9K720 Iskander
A long range surface-to-surface missile launcher. Can be equipped with cruise or ballistic missiles.
usm05s_intel_03:
Projectiles interception
To intercept a projectile, a unit require munitions that can target projectiles and its radar to be turned on.
usm05s_hint_01_text: You can now call in M270 with PrSM ballistic missiles
usm05s_hint_02_text: Aircraft with anti-radiation missiles are now available
usm05s_hint_03_text: You can call in HEMTT supply trucks now
usm05s_hint_04_text: You can call in Centurion C-RAM to protect your troops against incoming cruise missiles
usm05s_medal_1_c2: Eliminate an iskander with one of your own ballistic missiles
usm05s_medal_2_c2: Never let the Patriots go under 25% ammo.
usm05s_medal_3_c2: Don't lose a single unit to an Iskander missile
usm05s_dial_0010: We are approaching Chernyakhovsk. Let’s deploy our surface-to-air missile battery near the next crossroads.
usm05s_dial_0020: We’re already within range of their missiles, so it won’t be long before they...
usm05s_dial_0030: Ballistic missiles! Get off the road, NOW!
usm05s_dial_0050: We have to get that air defence setup ASAP, it won't be long before they shoot again.
usm05s_dial_0060:
They must have spotters nearby who guided this strike.
Find them Commander!
usm05s_dial_0070: Enemy observers eliminated. But there might be others.
usm05s_dial_0080: We found a team of spotters!
usm05s_dial_0100: One more team of spotters detected!
usm05s_dial_0140: The observers are running away, get them Commander!
usm05s_dial_0150: They are fleeing, don't let them hide again!
usm05s_dial_0160: They are running away, get those bastards Commander!
usm05s_dial_0170: Alright. we carefully combed the area. I think we found all the observers.
usm05s_dial_0180: Second volley of ballistic missiles incoming!
usm05s_dial_0190: Interception successful! But if they continue to hammer us like that we will soon run out of missiles.
usm05s_dial_0200: Call in supply trucks Commander, make sure the Patriots don't run out of ammo.
usm05s_dial_0210: Commander we need supplies for the Patriots!
usm05s_dial_0220: Wake up Commander, those Patriots wont resupply themselves!
usm05s_dial_0230: We can't stay here like sitting ducks, we've got to move up!
usm05s_dial_0240: Commander take control of our armored units and begin the attack in the direction of the ballistic missiles launch site.
usm05s_dial_0250: But I'd feel safer if you checked all the possible enemy observation posts around the Patriots first.
usm05s_dial_0260: And don't forget to keep the Patriots resupplied.
usm05s_dial_0270: Watch out Commander, you're being engaged by long range anti-tank missiles from thoses high rises.
usm05s_dial_0280: It might be best to use smoke to block their line of sight and assault their position.
usm05s_dial_0290: Don't bother with that Commander, we have our own Ballistic missiles available.
usm05s_dial_0300: Those PrSMs are the perfect tool to deal with entrenched static enemy positions. You can call them in as reinforcements.
usm05s_dial_0310: Aha! Let the ballistic missile duel begin!
usm05s_dial_0320: Of course they have their own air defense setup. Hitting the enemy Iskanders directly will be hard, especially if they reposition after each launch.
usm05s_dial_0330: We have a pair of SEAD planes available that might help with that.
usm05s_dial_0340: I'm afraid SEAD planes alone won't be enough to pass through their defense, you'll have to combine both SEAD and ballistic missiles to pass through.
usm05s_dial_0350: But progressing on the ground remains our best option in my opinion.
usm05s_dial_0370: Look at them running away. Don't let them escape!
usm05s_dial_0380: If my math is right, that makes six ballistic missile launchers destroyed. So the entire battery is out.
usm05s_dial_0390: Watch out Commander, you're exiting the interception bubble of the Patriots. Beyond this limit you can only count on your mobility to avoid being hit.
usm05s_dial_0400: Watch out, cruise missiles coming your way Commander!
usm05s_dial_0410: So they have a second battery of Iskanders hiding in the city. Eliminate that too, Commander.
usm05s_dial_0420:
They are increasing the pressure with SEAD planes.
Try to chase them off with your own planes Commander but we need additional protection for the Patriots.
usm05s_dial_0430: I will dispatch Centurion counter rocket systems around the Patriots, you can call in some of them as well to protect your forces Commander.
usm05s_dial_0440: We also need to improve our logistics: HEMTT trucks have been received, their much larger payload capacity should ease the logistics burden.
usm05s_dial_0450: One of the Patriots has been hit Commander! We need supplies immediately!
usm05s_dial_0460:
All the Patriots have been destroyed.
You have no choice but to carry on without any cover against ballistic missiles now.
usm05s_dial_0470:
All the Patriots have been destroyed.
I had some doubts about your competence, Commander, but now they're gone: you're undoubtedly incompetent.
usm05s_dial_0480: Counselor Miller, all the Iskanders have been destroyed. Mission accomplished.
usm05s_dial_0490:
Good, Good.
With the ballistic missile threat over Europe out of the way, let's see how the situation develops.
usm05s_dial_0500: They're trying to pull back and regroup, don't give them this opportunity Commander.
usm05s_dial_0510: Commander, the Patriots are running out of missiles, requesting supplies.
usm05s_dial_0520: The Patriots are under 50%, send supplies.
usm05s_dial_0530: Patriots' missile stockpile is below 50% Commander, they need supplies.
usm05s_dial_0540: Ammo level critical on the Patriots Commander!
usm05s_dial_0550: The Patriots are almost out of ammo Commander!
usm05s_dial_0560: One more volley and the Patriots will be out of ammo Commander!
usm05s_dial_0570: We're out of missiles, we need supplies right now!
usm05s_dial_0580: That was my last Patriot missile, we're completely exposed!
usm05s_dial_0590: No more missiles in the Patriots, resupply them now!
usm06n_desc: Attack the overextended Russian supply line with helicopters of the 101st Airborne division.
usm06n_task:
- Attack the enemy supply line
- Attack the retreating enemies
usm06n_hint: The 101st Airborne Division "Screaming Eagles" is a light infantry division specialized in air assaults using helicopters.
usm06n_cine_010: The Lithuanians have been forced to fall back behind the Nemunas river and abandon the key city of Kaunas. The road to Klaipeda is now wide open for the Russians.
usm06n_cine_020: Their convoys are already rushing towards the sea to link up with their troops routing from Kaliningrad and re-establish a cohesive frontline.
usm06n_cine_030: Their hasty movement and the large distance they need to cover means they can’t efficiently protect the entire road. It’s an opportunity to strike their supply line.
usm06n_cine_040: The 101st airborne division specializing in helicopter assaults has been airlifted to Poland and its first elements will be operational in a few hours.
usm06n_cine_050: Buckle up Commander, you will be leading the charge today.
usm06n_brief_010: We are tracking the movement of their troops with satellite imagery and have determined the most likely junction point for their troops.
usm06n_brief_020: We will strike right there and make sure they will never link up nor reach their destinations.
usm06n_brief_030: Fighting enemies coming from two different directions at once is not an advantageous situation. We are basically placing ourselves in a pincer configuration.
usm06n_brief_040: We will use the mobility of our helicopters to take the initiative and strike each enemy group alternatively rather than fighting them all at once.
usm06n_brief_050: Do as you wish, I'll let you handle the tactical details with the Commander.
usm06n_intel_01:
AH-64D Apache
Attack helicopter equipped with 70mm rockets, ideal to deal with infantry and lightly armored vehicles.
usm06n_intel_02:
AH-64E Guardian
Upgraded vrsion of the Apache with improve optics and armed with JAGM anti-tank missiles.
usm06n_intel_03:
OH-58D Kiowa Warrior
Light reconnaissance helicopters armed with Stinger air to air missiles.
usm06n_intel_04:
UH-60M Blackhawk
Medium utility helicopter able to carry troops, supplies and light vehicles like humvees.
usm06n_intel_05:
MH-47 Chinook
Heavy cargo helicopter able to lift up to 12500kg or transport up to 32 passengers.
usm06n_hint_01_text:
(Forward Arming and Refuelling Point)
Williams has established a resupply point for your helicopters in the village.
usm06n_hint_02_text: You can now call in Predator drones to observe enemy movements and strike from the sky.
usm06n_hint_03_text: Stealth fighters available. Use them at maximum range to maximize their stealth advantage.
usm06n_hint_04_text: Chinooks cargo helicopters are now available.
usm06n_hint_05_text: You can deploy your infantry with helicopters. Make sure the landing zone is clear, helicopters are fragile.
usm06n_hint_06_text: Troops equipped with Javelin top attack missiles are now available.
usm06n_medal_1_c1: Finish the mission in any difficulty level
usm06n_medal_2_c1: Finish the mission in medium difficulty or higher
usm06n_medal_2_c2: Don't let a single convoy pass through
usm06n_medal_3_c1: Finish the mission in hard difficulty
usm06n_medal_3_c2: Eliminate anti-air installation without losing helicopters
usm06n_dial_0010: Let's establish a forward arming and refuelling point in this village, Commander. It's located inbetween the two roads used by the enemy so we will be able to strike wherever we want rapidly.
usm06n_dial_0020: We're in contact with local civilians ready to help us, they will be informing us of enemy movements. Human intelligence still has its use as you can see.
usm06n_dial_0030: This train station is the furthest defensive position of the Russians. They unload their equipment from trains here and form convoys they send in the direction of Klaipeda.
usm06n_dial_0031: It's heavily defended so don't try to attack head on. All we have to do is to wait for the convoys to leave and attack them on the road with our helicopters.
usm06n_dial_0040: We have visual confirmation of a military convoy leaving the train station area and  heading to Klaipeda. Go give them a warm welcome, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0050: Great job Commander, if you destroy them fast enough they won't have time to report the attack to their HQ and they will continue to send more convoys in our direction.
usm06n_dial_0051: They're trying to escape, Commander! Go get them!
usm06n_dial_0052: One of the vehicle escaped, Commander! How could you fuck that up?! Now they know we are here.
usm06n_dial_0060: Dont forget to rearm and repair your helicopters at the FARP.
usm06n_dial_0070: Another civilian informer contacted us. He positioned himself near the road coming from Kaliningrad.
usm06n_dial_0080: He gave us a visual confirmation of battle-worn troops retreating from Kaliningrad, don't let them slip away!
usm06n_dial_0090: The next convoy coming from the train station has been spotted. These are only light trucks, nothing rocket pods and guns can't handle.
usm06n_dial_0100: The group of retreating troops coming from Kaliningrad has been destroyed, time to rearm the helicopters.
usm06n_dial_0110: This town is heavily defended. It would be a better idea to intercept convoys further down the road.
usm06n_dial_0120: The area around the train station is well defended. Wait for the convoys to move further away to attack them.
usm06n_dial_0150: Commander, a large column of armored vehicles is arriving from the direction of Klaipeda. I don't really get what they're doing. Normally they are supposed to attack in the other direction.
usm06n_dial_0170: A large convoy of vehicles is heading in our direction from Klaipeda. It's hard to identify exactly what it is, but it's heavy, and they're moving fast. They're kicking up a huge cloud of dust!
usm06n_dial_0181: No, wait! Those are ours! Hold you fire! Hold your fire!
usm06n_dial_0190: This is General Bennet, we're arriving from Klaipeda with USMC reinforcements. I understand now why we met so little resistance on the way.
usm06n_dial_0191: There are wrecks of enemy vehicles everywhere on that road. Is it a reenactment of the 2003 Highway of Death in Iraq?
usm06n_dial_0192:
Glad to see you alive and kicking, General!
Commander, we're done here, we RTB.
usm06n_dial_0200: A convoy moving in direction of Klaipeda is about to leave the AO, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0201: Watch out, this convoy is leaving the AO, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0202: Heads up Commander! A convoy is about to leave the AO.
usm06n_dial_0240: The convoy coming from the train station has been destroyed. Good job, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0241: Another convoy destroyed, keep up the good work Commander
usm06n_dial_0250: A group of retreating troops from Kaliningrad is about to leave the AO, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0251: Troops retreating from Kaliningrad are about to leave the AO, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0252: An enemy group retreating from Kaliningrad is about to leave the AO, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0270: This group of retreating troops is no more. Good job.
usm06n_dial_0271: Enemy retreating group successfuly intercepted and destroyed.
usm06n_dial_0272: Another retreating group eliminated, good kill!
usm06n_dial_0280: A convoy has exited the AO, should I remind you why we are here, Commander?
usm06n_dial_0281: Another convoy slipped through. Do you find the objective of this mission unclear, Commander?
usm06n_dial_0282: Another convoy escaped, Commander! Are you sure you can read a map? Because you seem to miss them all.
usm06n_dial_0290: We have detected two fast moving groups, one on each road, there's no choice here, you need to split your forces, Commander
usm06n_dial_0300: A convoy of artillery units escorted by powerful short range air defenses has been spotted. Let's ambush them with infantry rather than sacrificing helicopters.
usm06n_dial_0310: A large number of tanks escorted by multiple anti-helicopter units has been spotted. It would be best to ambush them with infantry rather than attacking head on with helicopters.
usm06n_dial_0320: You can call in infantry equipped with Javelins and drop them in concealed positions along the road to deal with these tanks.
usm06n_dial_0330: They decided to escort this convoy with Mi-24s apparently. Prepare some AA to welcome them.
usm06n_dial_0340: We have spotted a group of heavily armored vehicles. Our unguided rockets won't be enough against them, we need choppers with dedicated anti-tank missiles.
usm06n_dial_0350: The FARP is running out of supplies, Commander.
usm06n_dial_0360: I transfer the command of our cargo helicopters to you. Resupply the position in the village or establish a new FARP somewhere else.
usm06n_dial_0370: Watch out, a Russian drone. They are trying to identify your position.
usm06n_dial_0380: They'll probably arrive from the direction of Kaliningrad and try to go through our positions.
usm06n_dial_0390: This drone had all the time in the world to recon your positions. Now they sure know where to find you.
usm06n_dial_0400: Drone, shot down. This certainly gained us some time but also revealed our approximate position. Expect an attack from this direction.
usm06n_dial_0410: Enemy assault group detected, they're coming our way. Call back your helicopters and defend the FARP!
usm06n_dial_0440: Enemy attack repelled, great job, Commander!
usm06n_dial_0450: More enemy drones coming your way!
usm06n_dial_0460: They know we're here, they know we have mostly helicopters. Expect a larger assault equipped with anti-aircraft defense this time.
usm06n_dial_0470: Large enemy assault group spotted, heading toward the FARP!
usm06n_dial_0480: The enemy assault has been stopped. Good job, Commander!
usm06n_dial_0490: So far so good, Commander. Let's hope it continues that way!
usm06n_dial_0491: Oh no... Looks like I jinxed it. Enemy fighter spotted!
usm06n_dial_0500: I was sure they would react that way. I'm sending in a F-22 Raptor to help you out.
usm06n_dial_0510: Look at that: One bogey down!
usm06n_dial_0520: Thanks for the assist but our helicopters dealt with that plane already.
usm06n_dial_0530: Damn! They have heavy SAMs covering the airspace. Abort! Return to base!
usm06n_dial_0550: Our jet has been shot down!
usm06n_dial_0570: The pilot managed to eject Commander. I'm transferring you a team of Pararescuemen to recover him.
usm06n_dial_0580: We still have an ejected pilot waiting for recovery, Commander. You should go and get him.
usm06n_dial_0600: Our pilot made it back, good job!
usm06n_dial_0630: Heads up! Enemy fighter in the air!
usm06n_dial_0650: I'm sure there will be more enemy air patrols, so be careful. The sooner you get rid of that AA position the better.
usm06n_dial_0640: The Raptors can be called in as reinforcements Commander. But you should find and destroy this long range anti-air position first, our fighters can't properly cover our helicopters as long as it stays here!
usm06n_dial_0690: The sky is ours, we can now use drones with relative safety now.
usm06n_dial_0700: Let's establish a forward arming and refuelling point in this village, Commander. The troops falling back from Kaliningrad should pass through it so we'll ambush them here.
usm06n_dial_0590: The Pararescue team is here, they will handle the pilot's recovery.
usm06n_dial_0660: Careful, go around the forest on low altitude and strike it from an angle it's not expecting!
usm06n_dial_0670: That's the way you do it
usm06n_dial_0680: Sometimes it do be like that.
usm06s_title: With a Little Help From My Friends
usm06s_desc: A warm welcome to our German allies and their Leopard 2 tanks.
usm06s_task:
- Unload the Leopard from the train
- Resupply the tanks and prepare them for battle.
- Hand over the tanks to the german crews
usm06s_hint: The Leopard 2A7 is the most numerous main battle tank in the German inventory, with more than 100 units available.
usm06s_cine_010: I have very good news! With the threat of the Ballistic missiles eliminated, Germany and Poland have agreed to send forces to help us.
usm06s_cine_020: Two armored brigades are currently being moved north by train and will position themselves near Kaunas to support the Lithuanian forces defending the city.
usm06s_cine_030: We have received reports signaling that the Russians are massing troops there but with these European forces at our side this war should finally start turning in our favour.
usm06s_cine_040: The Russian forces progressed fast through the Baltic States but they are not as numerous as they seem. They only hold the main axes and cannot control the vast majority of the countryside.
usm06s_cine_050: One decisive battle is all we need to turn the tide in our favor. We could take back all that ground as quickly as they took it and force them to sue for peace.
usm06s_cine_060: A figure of speech of course, since no war has been officially declared…
usm06s_brief_010: Williams, the train carrying the tanks from Poland and Germany will soon arrive in Marijampolė.
usm06s_brief_020: I need you to coordinate with our European partners to make sure they become combat effective as soon as possible.
usm06s_brief_030: Please give them a warm welcome on our behalf and ensure that they have everything they need.
usm06s_brief_040:
Sorry Sir, but as a diplomatic envoy, isn’t that your job to shake hands?
Shouldn’t I be on the front preparing our defense instead of playing butler?
usm06s_brief_050: So you're mistaking me for a butler.
usm06s_brief_060: No Sir that's not what I meant…
usm06s_brief_070: My job is to decide who is best suited for each task, and your job is to do as I say.
usm06s_brief_080: And I said that you should play the glorified cheerleader for our allies, not me.
usm06s_brief_100: And go with her Commander, I don’t need you either.
usm06s_intel_01:
Leopard 2A7
One of the most advanced version of the iconic German tank. Perfectly capable to deal with any Russian armored vehicle.
usm06s_intel_02:
Fire Team
Rear echelon unit composed of 4 men, generally patrolling in humvees.
usm06s_intel_03:
MML (Multi Mission Launcher)
A truck carrying 15 Hellfire missile with high-explosive warheads which can be fired in quick succession at both helicopters and vehicles.
usm06s_medal_2_condition: Don't lose a single Leopard tank
usm06s_medal_3_condition: Win the mission without the Leopards
usm06s_dial_0010: Hey commander, the first train carrying the German Leopard tanks just arrived. We're tasked with unloading and preparing them while waiting for the German crews to get here.
usm06s_dial_0020: Now we've become freight handlers. What a promotion! Take those trucks and go grab supplies from the depot, Commander, I'll manage the unloading.
usm06s_dial_0030: I'm starting to understand why the General was never Miller's biggest fan.
usm06s_dial_0040: I'm starting to understand why the General isn't Miller's biggest fan.
usm06s_dial_0050: This guy is completely bipolar. One day you're best buddies, the next he treats you like shit.
usm06s_dial_0060: But well, it is what it is. Let's hope this war will soon be over and we can move on.
usm06s_dial_0070: Those German tanks will sure help with that, so let's get them prepped ASAP.
usm06s_dial_0080: Hey, Commander? Those supplies won't haul themselves!
usm06s_dial_0090: I know we're not in a hurry today, Commander, but if Miller comes back and those tanks aren't ready, he's gonna hit the roof. So go get those supplies!
usm06s_dial_0100: I swear, if Miller comes back and you've still done nothing, I won't take the blame for you!
usm06s_dial_0110: Mmh... Strange. I didn't receive any word about Lithuanian reinforcements heading our way.
usm06s_dial_0120: Hey guys, the frontline is in the other direction! Did you get lost? What's your unit?
usm06s_dial_0130: Oh shit, they're shooting at us!
usm06s_dial_0140: Cease fire! Blue on blue! I repeat, blue on blue! Cease your fire!
usm06s_dial_0150: Fuck! Those are Russian soldiers exiting the Lithuanian vehicles! We're under attack!
usm06s_dial_0160: Commander, take control of the Leopards already unloaded, establish a defensive perimeter! I'm calling for reinforcements!
usm06s_dial_0170: Don't let them come near the train!
usm06s_dial_0180: Oh no no no no no... Fuck me!
usm06s_dial_0190: Williams to Miller, Williams to Miller, do you copy?! We're under attack! We need support!
usm06s_dial_0200: Fuck! Where is this guy when you need him?!
usm06s_dial_0210: We lost the train; there is nothing left to protect, so let's switch to attack mode! Those Russians have never seen me pissed off before!
usm06s_dial_0220: Help me retake the outskirts of the city, Commander! Push them hard; let's send them back to wherever they came from!
usm06s_dial_0230: Try not to lose any of those Leopard tanks. We don't have many left, let's keep them in good shape, for whatever it's worth.
usm06s_dial_0240: The train yard is back under our control. Nicely done, Commander!
usm06s_dial_0250: The factory is back in our hands. Good job, Commander!
usm06s_dial_0260: Now, focus on the other objective. I'm sending troops to hold this one.
usm06s_dial_0270: The outskirts of the city are secured. They'll certainly try to counterattack, but we now have excellent defensive positions.
usm06s_dial_0280: Put ATGMs in the buildings and engage the enemies as they cross the open fields.
usm06s_dial_0290: You've lost the factory Commander! Retake it immediately!
usm06s_dial_0300: You've lost the train yard, Commander! Don't let them solidify their position! Retake it!
usm06s_dial_0310: Okay, it looks like they've had enough for today, they're falling back. But the damage is done.
usm06s_dial_0320: Williams?! Williams, do you copy?! What the hell is happening here ?
usm06s_dial_0330: We've been attacked, Sir. But we managed to repel them.
usm06s_dial_0340: Alright... but where are the German tanks?
usm06s_dial_0350: Most were destroyed during the initial strike. We did our best, but only a handful remain.
usm06s_dial_0360: They've all been destroyed, Counselor. I'm sorry, we did our best, but they took us by surprise.
usm06s_dial_0370: Oh God, why can't I assign a task to anyone without it going to shit? ...
usm06s_dial_0380: But those were only empty tanks, they can send more.
usm06s_dial_0390: Williams, I don't think you understand how little military reserve the Europeans have. Those tanks represented about 20% of what Germany has to offer, and they were destroyed in a minute.
usm06s_dial_0400: Do you really think that after what just happened they will be willing to send more?!
usm06s_dial_0420: They are already pressuring us to negotiate with the Russians on terms we're not happy with; this will weaken our position further.
usm06s_dial_0430: You've lost a Leopard tank, Commander!
usm06s_dial_0440: Another Leopard tank destroyed! You gotta stop doing that, Miller will be furious!
usm06s_dial_0450: Nooo! Another Leopard lost, Commander! Oh well fuck it, Miller's gonna rip me apart anyway.
usm07_desc: Desperate times call for desperate measures.
usm07_task: - Defeat the Russian assault at all cost
usm07_hint: SADM stands for Special Atomic Demolition Munition, a man portable mini nuclear bomb developed and fielded during the cold war. Possible targets described in the employment manuals include bridges, dams, canals, tunnels, airfields, railroad marshaling yards, ports and industrial plants, and power facilities.
usm07_cine_010: Counselor! Alarming communication from Kaunas: The Russians have launched a massive assault across the river supported by airstrikes and a heavy artillery barrage. The Lithuanian forces lost their cohesion  and our troops were forced to retreat.
usm07_cine_020:
Nemunas river is our last line of defense. If the Russians cross it, it’s over. We lose the Baltic States and who knows where they will stop!
Order a counter attack immediately!
usm07_cine_030: Sir, our troops have already had their asses handed to them by the artillery, if they attack they won’t last an hour! The Russians have committed everything they have to this assault.
usm07_cine_040: Exactly, and it is time to turn this disaster into a golden opportunity. We have one last chance to stop them and I need a distraction for the Russians. Order the counter attack!
usm07_cine_050: But I don’t understand, what’s the point? Without any reinforcement coming this is a useless sacrifice!
usm07_cine_060: Stop contesting my orders Williams! I’ve brought you up to this position, I can bring you all the way down if I want!
usm07_cine_070:
I don't know if you've noticed, but we're losing this war. So I hope I don't have to justify myself every minute over the death of a few hundred soldiers.
Order the counter attack now!
usm07_cine_080: No! I refuse to participate in this slaughter if you don’t tell me what's going on first!
usm07_cine_100: Well look, there is a dam overlooking the city holding 500 million cubic meters of water.
usm07_cine_110: So if this dam happened to be destroyed, the entire valley would be flooded.
usm07_cine_120: All the pontoons, bridges, and all the Russian troops and their equipment massed for the assault would be washed away.
usm07_cine_130: This would also create an uncrossable natural barrier for weeks if not months to come, giving us time to re organise our defense and save us from a humiliating defeat.
usm07_brief_010: Captain, are you and your men ready?
usm07_brief_030: Missions objectives are clear, 3 men Green Light Teams, low altitude drop in the river, swim downstream, plant the device, and kaboom.
usm07_brief_040: Perfect. Hum, you know about… the procedure…
usm07_brief_050: We all know the procedure sir, it’s been an honor.
usm07_brief_070: Wait, what device? A few swimmers will never be able to carry enough explosive to blow up the dam!
usm07_brief_080: And this is the plan you are ready to sacrifice all our men for? This is crazy!
usm07_brief_090: Ah Williams, always sticking your nose where you shouldn’t aren’t you?
usm07_brief_100: I can see that your motivation has waned recently, so let me explain what's going to happen.
usm07_brief_110: And I hope that this will cheer you up and make you fully cooperative again.
usm07_brief_120: Have you ever heard of SADM?
usm07_brief_140: No, the bomb. Special Atomic Demolition Munition. A man-portable low yield nuclear device.
usm07_brief_150: Most of them were decommissioned at the end of the cold war but of course we kept a few just in case. So believe me... the dam will definitely blow up.
usm07_brief_160: A nuclear bomb? Are you insane? I refuse to participate in this operation!
usm07_brief_170: Oh you are participating in this operation Lieutenant Colonel Williams. Look, you are even leading it according to these papers bearing your signature.
usm07_brief_180: Which means that if the mission were to fail, be assured that you would be the one taking the blame, not me.
usm07_brief_190: So I would put all my skills and effort into making it succeed if i were you
usm07_brief_200: Remember, I’m only an advisor here, and I strongly advise you to do exactly as I say.
usm07_intel_01: The choices you make during this mission will have important consequences. Choose carefully.
usm07_intel_02: The Russians have established a multi-layered air defense network. Deploying aircraft without first degrading it would be suicidal.
usm07_intel_03: We have detected artillery of all calibers shelling our positions, from 82 mm to 203 mm. This will seriously complicate the operation.
usm07_hint_01_text: Bennett's units are now available to you.
usm07_hint_02_text: Miller's units are now available to you.
usm07_task_control_dam: Take full control of the dam
usm07_task_def_hills: Create a defensive perimeter in the hills
usm07_medal_1_condition: Repel the Russian assault by any means necessary
usm07_medal_2_condition: Follow Miller's plan to the letter
usm07_choice_stay: Defend the bomb to the very end.
usm07_dial_0010: Counselor Miller, the situation is critical. The remaining Lithuanian forces are under heavy attack and require our immediate assistance.
usm07_dial_0020: There is nothing we can do for them, you would only be delaying the inevitable. We need to focus on the dam.
usm07_dial_0030: The Green Light team carrying the nuclear device should arrive at any moment.
usm07_dial_0040: Progress toward the dam, we'll divert enemy attention to give them a clear route.
usm07_dial_0050: I refuse to use the Lithuanians as a meatshield just to save a few of our own!
usm07_dial_0060: Commander, you advance toward the dam; I’ll cover your flank and assist the Lithuanians.
usm07_dial_0070: Look, Commander, friendly forces are arriving from the west!
usm07_dial_0080: This is General Bennet to all friendly forces; watch your fire, we’re arriving from Klaipėda. Do you copy?
usm07_dial_0090: General! Thank god you are here!
usm07_dial_0092: I'm harder to kill than that. We managed to reach Klaipėda with the rest of our ships and hid among all those tankers.
usm07_dial_0100: I was worried I’d miss the fight. I hauled USMC armor all the way from Klaipėda, moving at a forced pace to catch up.
usm07_dial_0110: Link up with me, together we have a chance to stop this assault.
usm07_dial_0120: Negative General, maintain your position! Stay away from the river, we are going to blow up the dam and drown the whole valley, Russians included.
usm07_dial_0130: You realize half the city lies in that valley, don’t you?
usm07_dial_0140: Believe me, if there were another credible alternative, I would take it. And a few more of our tanks won't change the situation.
usm07_dial_0150: Commander, think about it. Yes we are outnumbered, but there's no need for such extreme measures. If we combine our forces we could at least contain the attack.
usm07_dial_0160: And for how long, General? By coming here, you’ve left our flank exposed. The Russians will soon notice and surround us. So we need to annihilate them now more than ever.
usm07_dial_0170: Commander, please listen to me. Don’t let their numbers influence you. I fought at the Battle of 73 Easting. We had 36 tanks against more than 150 of theirs, and we won!
usm07_dial_0180: Move your forces to mine, and together we can beat those Russians too.
usm07_dial_0190: Don’t listen to him, Commander. We’re not fighting Iraqi T-55s here.
usm07_dial_0200: Green light team reporting, we're in the AO, heading toward the target
usm07_dial_0210: Glad to hear your voice, Captain. The situation here is… chaotic, to say the least. Proceed ASAP.
usm07_dial_0220: Meanwhile, we’ll lure as many enemy units as possible into our trap.
usm07_dial_0230: Commander, head for those hills and establish a defensive perimeter. This will draw a large number of their troops into the lowlands around your position and maximize the effect of the flood.
usm07_dial_0240: Let the enemy surround you if you must, but maintain control of the high ground and hold until the detonation.
usm07_dial_0250: Where do you think you're going, Commander? Williams, keep your subordinate on a short leash, will you?
usm07_dial_0260: Sorry, Counselor. In accordance with DoD recommendations, I favor a decentralized command structure.
usm07_dial_0270: The Commander may independently assess the situation and take whatever action is deemed necessary.
usm07_dial_0280: Stop fucking with me! Commander, return immediately and head for the dam!
usm07_dial_0290: Final warning, Commander! That goes for you as well, Williams. Your orders are clear: advance toward the dam!
usm07_dial_0300: Apologies, Counselor Miller, but you are just a advisor here. The Commander doesn't take orders from you.
usm07_dial_0310: You’re going to regret that, Williams. Crossing me comes with a price. Just ask the General how steep it can be.
usm07_dial_0320: There you are! Good. Now let’s win this battle my way: first, we need to reform a cohesive defensive line.
usm07_dial_0330: Williams, maintain your positions. Rally as many retreating units as possible and prevent any additional enemy amphibious crossings.
usm07_dial_0331: Meanwhile, we need to regain control of those bridges, Commander.
usm07_dial_0340: Miller, our troops are in the middle of the valley, belay that order!
usm07_dial_0350: Perfect General, you 're excellent bait for the enemy. Stay put, act natural, and wait for the flash!
usm07_dial_0360: Goddamn it! Commander, we can’t let this madness go on!
usm07_dial_0370: If we manage to repel the Russian assault far enough from the valley, there will be no point in blowing up the dam anymore, and the city will be saved.
usm07_dial_0371: I see two options: One, we launch a direct attack on their command and control center and destroy everything there.
