rum02n_dial_0370: That’s enough bragging, Batalin! Remember your rank. The Kommander doesn’t charge in blindly like you do!
rum02n_dial_0380: With Muuga Harbor under our control, we can now set up a logistics hub and begin preparations for the next stage of the operation. Well done.
rum02n_dial_0400: We'll follow this road to where it meets Highway E20 by the lake. This crossroad is the perfect spot to set up an ambush.
rum02n_dial_0410: The enemy units retreating from Narva will arrive from the left and try to reach Tallinn on the other side.
rum02n_dial_0420: Special reserve units are available for deployment. It's a one-time delivery so make it count!
rum02n_dial_0430: BTR-90s? Seriously? Seems like army warehouses are full of forgotten treasures!
rum02n_dial_0440: I know not with what weapons World War III will be fought, but World War IV will be fought with the good old SPG-9s!
rum02n_dial_0450: Oh look, it's our seaside holiday lovers, showing up on every beach on the planet since 1938!
rum02n_dial_0460: Excellent. Reinforcements are en route. While the Commander sets up the ambush, you, Batalin, will remain in the harbor and organize the defenses. The enemy may attempt to retake it.
rum02n_dial_0470: With respect, Comrade Colonel, my men are fully prepared to engage. I request permission to support the ambush.
rum02n_dial_0480: Captain, you are to stay in reserve. Overconcentration of forces in a single area will hinder overall efficiency.
rum02n_dial_0500: Engines rumbling through the winter storm, tracks cutting through wet snow, every sound echoes the past. The First Chechen Campaign still lingers in my mind.
rum02n_dial_0510: Back then, I was a captain, just like you: young, untested. I had no clue what we were about to face.
rum02n_dial_0520: My memories are much different from yours, Comrade Colonel. I was just a kid back then. But I remember the sound of the tracks in the snow...
rum02n_dial_0530: Speed up, Kommander. The enemy will not wait for you.
rum02n_dial_0540: The crew of a reconnaissance Su-24 shot down earlier tonight has just activated their beacon. No idea what took them so long, but we need to reach them before the enemy does.
rum02n_dial_0550: The signal is weak and coming from the direction of the lake. Looks like they had a rough landing.
rum02n_dial_0560: Look! Distress smoke! Near the lake!
rum02n_dial_0570: Visual on the crash site, they're alive! At least one of them is seriously wounded and require emergency treatment.
rum02n_dial_0580: We've established a field hospital near the harbor. Bring them here, or load them onto a transport and send them back to base.
rum02n_dial_0590: The injured crew reached the hospital in time. With proper care, they may even return to duty.
rum02n_dial_0600: We didn’t make it in time. The crew succumbed to their injuries before reaching the hospital. They served with honor. Rest in peace.
rum02n_dial_0610: Look what we found! A supply depot! That will come in handy!
rum02n_dial_0620: Alright, you're in position, Kommander. The first enemy units arriving from Narva will be here soon. Our drone has spotted them on the highway.
rum02n_dial_0630: The first retreating units are arriving in your sector. These are Estonians, or rather what's left of them.
rum02n_dial_0650: The first enemy group has walked into our trap. But that was just a small group of already beaten up units.
rum02n_dial_0660: It means they were not aware of our presence, but also that their best units must be fighting as a rear guard.
rum02n_dial_0670: Now they know we're here, and they won’t fall for it twice. Fortify your defenses! Cover the flanks!
rum02n_dial_0680: I’m ready to assist. The port defenses are already reinforced, and there's nothing happening on my end.
rum02n_dial_0700: Then why can’t I join the battle? Everything’s going according to plan so far.
rum02n_dial_0710: "So far", Captain. Stay in reserve, I'm sure your troops will be needed in due time.
rum02n_dial_0720: Bad news, Kommander. Enemy units are advancing from Tallinn and approaching from the opposite direction on the highway.
rum02n_dial_0730: Those appear to be US Marines units sent to reinforce the defense of the city. Don't let them link up with the retreating Estonians!
rum02n_dial_0740: Kommander, I pulled some strings to gain access to additional assets from the fleet. A pair of Kamov Ka-52K Katran helicopters is available as reinforcements.
rum02n_dial_0750: Colonel! These helicopters were not supposed to be part of your operation. Please refrain from appropriating equipment assigned to other missions.
rum02n_dial_0760: I don’t see any other operation happening around here. What are you talking about?!
rum02n_dial_0770: Just stick to the equipment that was assigned to you in the future, Colonel. Have I made myself clear?
rum02n_dial_0780: Crystal clear, ma'am. Let's talk about that once the operation is complete.
rum02n_dial_0790: There is nothing to discuss, Colonel. Over.
rum02n_dial_0800: Our troops arriving from Narva made contact and should be there soon, which means that you're now fighting the elite rear-guard of the enemy retreating troops.
rum02n_dial_0810: Batalin, it's time for you to step in, send your troops to reinforce the intersection. We must hold the line!
rum02n_dial_0820:
Yes, sir, Comrade Colonel! I’m deploying my forces immediately.
Kommander, my men will be there soon, let’s see who kicks the most American asses!
rum02n_dial_0830: Our reinforcements from Narva are almost there, hold the line!
rum02n_dial_0840: Finally, our troops from Narva are here. Now that’s what I call a multi-layered encirclement sandwich!
rum02n_dial_0850: The enemy group coming from Narva has surrendered! We didn’t leave them much of a choice in this situation. Now, let’s focus on the enemy group arriving from Tallinn.
rum02n_dial_0860: Comrade Colonel, the enemy coming up from Tallinn is surrendering en masse. What’s going on? They’re not even trying to organize a defense! I don’t understand!
rum02n_dial_0870: I have no idea. Maybe it's a ruse, stay on your guard!
rum02n_dial_0880: Hey, check it out! Friendly forces are coming up behind them from Tallinn! How’s that possible?
rum02n_dial_0890: Greetings again, Colonel. As you can see, your little operation gave us just the diversion we needed to launch a landing directly in the harbor of Tallinn.
rum02n_dial_0900: The city was taken with almost no resistance, and the Estonian government has been captured. They’ve just signed the capitulation of their forces.
rum02n_dial_0910: And I suppose notifying me about the existence of this second operation was too much to ask, Agent Morozova?
rum02n_dial_0920: Secrecy is of utmost importance when conducting that kind of operation, Colonel. And I'm in a very good position to know that people talk. One way or another, they always do.
rum02n_dial_0930: We lost the highway! Take it back! That's an order!
rum02n_dial_0940: The enemy forces have pushed us back from the highway and linked up. We must prepare for a long, grueling siege to capture Tallinn.
rum02n_dial_0950: All the combat swimmers have been killed. The landing zone is not safe, abort the operation.
rum02n_dial_0960: Those were friendly units you killed, Kommander! Be more careful where you shoot.
rum02n_dial_0970: Another friendly fire incident Kommander! This is your last warning!
rum02n_dial_0980: Your actions reek of betrayal, Kommander. I'm sure Morozova would love to have you to herself for a little private time.
rum02n_dial_0990: Our losses are mounting, they’re clearly not backing down!
rum03n_desc: The USMC forces we are facing must be landing somewhere. Pärnu seems the most obvious place for that.
rum03n_task:
- Take control of the airfield
- Advance deeper into Pärnu
- Prevent the Marine Corps from landing in the city
rum03n_hint: SSO (Sily Spetsialʹnykh Operatsiy) are elite Russian special forces. They are highly mobile, well-armed, and trained to carry out the most complex missions.
rum03n_cine_010: Tallinn has fallen and the Estonian army has surrendered but they were not alone. US marine units were helping them with heavy equipment.
rum03n_cine_020: The most likely location they could have come from is Pärnu. This is Estonia's last major coastal city located at the head of a bay protected from the swell. A perfect place for sea landing operations.
rum03n_cine_030: There is also an airport near the town currently being renovated for conversion into a military base.
rum03n_cine_040: We should send reconnaissance there to evaluate the situation. If we manage to capture the airport and position anti-ship missiles on the coast we would be able to lock down the entire gulf of Riga.
rum03n_brief_010: Sir, permission to be part of the first wave?
rum03n_brief_020: Yes Batalin, you will get your share of glory, don't worry!
rum03n_brief_030: Best case scenario, we encounter limited or no resistance at all and we can land some planes to bring rapid reinforcements.
rum03n_brief_040: Worst case scenario, the resistance is too strong, in which case you need to fall back and wait for our ground reinforcements to arrive.
rum03n_brief_060: Stop acting so recklessly Batalin! One day you will get yourself killed. I’ve lost enough men under my command to add your name to the list!
rum03n_brief_070: Don’t play hero today, and if things go bad retreat immediately!
rum03n_brief_080: Of course Colonel. At your orders.
rum03n_intel_01:
Snaipery (ASVK)
A 2-man sniper team armed with anti-materiel ASVK rifles. Effective against infantry and light vehicles.
rum03n_intel_02:
SSO
Army special forces unit equipped with Kornet ATGMs firing long-range thermobaric warheads. Highly effective against infantry and lightly armored targets.
rum03n_intel_03:
Spetsnaz VMF
Elite coastal special forces. Equipped with weapons tailored for urban combat and anti-infantry operations.
rum03n_hint_01_text: Your Special Forces units are limited. Don’t waste them.
rum03n_hint_02_text: You have access to an Iskander-K missile system armed with cruise missiles.
rum03n_medal_1_c2: Cross the river without using the bridges
rum03n_medal_2_c2: Kill all the LCACs with the Iskanders
rum03n_medal_3_c2: Kill 50 enemy units with SSO or Spetsnaz VMF
rum03n_dial_0010: We have the city of Pärnu in sight. The area seems mostly undefended, but USMC units could arrive at any moment. So we must act without delay.
rum03n_dial_0020:
Conduct a reconnaissance and secure the perimeter of the airfield with our Spetsnaz units.
We will airlift additional reinforcements once it's done.
rum03n_dial_0030: Kommander you're in charge of the right side of the runway, Batalin will be on your left flank. Get to work boys!
rum03n_dial_0040: Okay the Spetsnaz are on the ground. Batalin, what is the situation on your side?
rum03n_dial_0050: My group is on its way, touchdown in one minute.
rum03n_dial_0060: Roger that, Captain. Establish your perimeter, then sweep the forests near the swamps.
rum03n_dial_0061: You've lost your entire group, Kommander! I cancel the operation, we cannot land our planes on a contested airfield.
rum03n_dial_0070: Enemy resistance eliminated. Comrade Colonel, the airfield is ours.
rum03n_dial_0080:
Good job!
Krechet-2, do you copy? The airfield is under our control, you are cleared to land.
rum03n_dial_0090: Krechet-2 copies. Beginning the approach, we'll be there in less than 10 minutes.
rum03n_dial_0100: Captain, Kommander, you must hold the airfield until the arrival of the planes.
rum03n_dial_0150: Establish overwatch in nearby buidings and report any enemy activity. We must expect a counter-attack coming from the city.
rum03n_dial_0140: A second wave of helicopters carrying Spetsnaz is also available as reinforcements.
rum03n_dial_0160: Here they come! Don't let them breach the perimeter!
rum03n_dial_0170: Situation report, Colonel. Have you taken control of the city already?
rum03n_dial_0180: Not yet Ma'am, we're still waiting for our planes to arrive.
rum03n_dial_0190: Don’t waste any time. We need to deploy our anti-ship missiles on those beaches as quickly as possible to cut off Riga’s supply lines.
rum03n_dial_0200: We will progress as fast as possible, don't worry Ma'am!
rum03n_dial_0210:
Thank you, Captain. Your motivation is a welcome relief, especially when all we get from others are delays and endless talk of impossibilities.
Morozova out.
rum03n_dial_0220: Твою мать Batalin! I'm the one giving the orders here, so you don't report to anyone else! Is that clear?!
rum03n_dial_0222: Well stop thinking then! And do as your told!
rum03n_dial_0240: Сука, they've brought IFVs! Keep the helicopters clear of their autocannons. Use the SSO's Kornets to deal with them!
rum03n_dial_0230: Attention, the planes are arriving. Clear the runway!
rum03n_dial_0231: We have lost control of the landing zone! Krechet-2, return to base, I repeat: return to base. We are shutting down the operation.
rum03n_dial_0250: The Hellducks are here, boys! Stay clear of enemy positions, they’ve got a little surprise for them!
rum03n_dial_0260: Now that’s a landing! That’s what I’m talking about! We’ll take this little town in no time!
rum03n_dial_0270: Don’t claim victory just yet, Captain. Our airlifted group is limited to lightly armored vehicles. So, BTRs and BMPs are all we’ve got.
rum03n_dial_0280: Don’t claim victory just yet, Captain. Our airlifting capabilities are limited so we could only bring a single tank platoon. If they’re destroyed, there won’t be any replacements.
rum03n_dial_0290: With the airfield secured we can begin the attack of the city itself.
rum03n_dial_0300: The Estonians have fallen back. Don't give them time to recover and secure those bridges as soon as possible, Kommander.
rum03n_dial_0310: Batalin, proceed along the left flank through the swamps, then cross the river upstream at the ford.
rum03n_dial_0311: What the hell are you doing, Kommander?! I’ll have you court-martialed for this!
rum03n_dial_0320: "Draw the attention of the enemy with a frontal decoy assault, then strike with your main forces from an unexpected direction."
rum03n_dial_0330: Exactly like in your memoirs, Comrade Colonel! Which means I’ll be the decisive instrument of your strategy. It's an honor Comrade Colonel!
rum03n_dial_0340: Stop quoting those stupid memoirs Captain!
rum03n_dial_0360: The name of the author! Watching you in the field, it's obvious you couldn't have written that!
rum03n_dial_0370: It... It was a long time ago... things were different back then, I was a young and impulsive Captain. I've matured.
rum03n_dial_0380: Now, let’s get back to the operation at hand, shall we?!
rum03n_dial_0381:
What are you doing in my swamp, Kommander?
Focus on your sector!
rum03n_dial_0382: You’re crossing into my troops’ line of fire, Kommander! Stay in your sector, don't risk friendly fire!
rum03n_dial_0383: It's very quiet around here. Our air force really did a number on them. Let's hope it's not just the calm before the storm.
rum03n_dial_0384: Why don't we take the enemy's abandoned equipment?
rum03n_dial_0385: Everything is messed up. This junk will only slow us down.
rum03n_dial_0386: What are you waiting for, Kommander? You can admire the scenery later, after we’ve taken the city!
rum03n_dial_0390: Fuck, we’re too late! The US Marines are already here! Move it, secure those bridges! We need to drive them back into the sea.
rum03n_dial_0420: Have you still not finished subduing the city? The Iskander anti-ship missiles have arrived and must be deployed along the coastline to deny the US Navy access to the bay.
rum03n_dial_0421: They can also be used against ground targets if needed. Kommander, take control of the Iskanders and use them to accelerate your progression.
rum03n_dial_0430: As always, the coolest toys are not for me...
rum03n_dial_0431: Bypassing the bridges by water, smart move, Kommander. Finally, those amphibious vehicles are paying off.
rum03n_dial_0432: Looks like we've outplayed them! Rivers pose no obstacle to us!
rum03n_dial_0440: The USMC is bringing additional reinforcements ashore using LCAC hovercraft. Destroy them all or secure the beach to prevent any further landings.
rum03n_dial_0500: Kommander, enemy mortars spotted. They’ll be a problem if we don't eliminate them rapidly.
rum03n_dial_0510: First hovercraft sent to the bottom! Funny how they deflate like balloons when you shoot at them.
rum03n_dial_0520: All the ships have been sunk, Comrade Colonel! They’ll have to swim their way into the fight now!
rum03n_dial_0530: The shoreline is under our control, Comrade Colonel! The enemy ships are retreating!
rum03n_dial_0531: Great job, boys! Let’s set up those Iskanders on the shoreline and turn our sights toward Riga.
rum03n_dial_0540: Time to officially recognize our Iskander crews as landscape designers.
rum03n_dial_0550: Exactly. That’s how we’ve won every war. While the enemy draws up their offensive maps, we reshape the landscape itself.
rum03n_dial_0560:
Enemy tanks! Take cover!
The SSO’s thermobaric missiles are ineffective against them. Ambush them with RPGs!
rum03n_dial_0570: Charge them with your vehicles, Kommander! Autocannons can't pierce their frontal armor, but if you attack from multiple directions, you can hit their side armor where they’re vulnerable!
rum04n_desc: We have found the USMC fleet.
rum04n_task:
- Capture the city of Kuressaare
- Secure the airfield
- Deal with the US fleet
rum04n_hint: Most anti-ship missiles have the ability to hit ground targets too. If they can hit a moving ship, hitting land is no stretch.
rum04n_cine_010: Riga will soon be fully under our control and the US marines landing in Parnu has been prevented. We are doing great in the North.
rum04n_cine_020: But things are not going great in the south Colonel, the Suwalki gap is wide open and the Americans are bringing more and more reinforcements from overseas.
rum04n_cine_030: We need to relocate our troops to the South as soon as possible.
rum04n_cine_040: There is one last task at hand before we can do that.
rum04n_cine_050: The USMC rear base in Estonia was not located in Pärnu, leaving only one option: Kuressaare.
rum04n_cine_060: This is the last naval air base in the region, once we control it the gulf of Riga will definitely be ours.
rum04n_brief_010: You're too slow Colonel! And you too Kommander!
rum04n_brief_020: You had all the cards in hand to make this Estonian campaign a lightning victory!
rum04n_brief_030: Instead of what you have progressed like slugs, being overly careful when momentum was the key.
rum04n_brief_040: And while you took your sweet time we were losing Lithuania!
rum04n_brief_050: Watch your mouth, girl! You've filled Batalin's head with your ideas of glorious battles and lightning victory. See where that led him!
rum04n_brief_060: I am a decorated officer of the Russian army and the Soviet army before that.
rum04n_brief_070: War has been my entire life, so from now on we will do things as I say and you will sit and watch!
rum04n_brief_075: Your father was not a goddamn hero, he died like an fool because he swallowed the same pathetic heroic crap you've been feeding Balatin all this time!
rum04n_brief_080: You will pay those words dearly, I swear it, Colonel Demidov.
rum04n_brief_090: Well go on then, do your worst!
rum04n_intel_01:
Arleigh Burke Destroyer
Armed with a 127mm rapid firing gun and numerous cruise missiles, this ship is a massive threat and must be eliminated.
rum04n_intel_02:
Landing helicopter assault (LHA)
This carrier is well protected by multiple anti-missile systems.
rum04n_task_city: Take control of the inner city
rum04n_hint_01_text: Ka-52K helicopters, Tu-22M3 strike planes and Iskanders are now available with anti-ship missiles.
rum04n_choice_armored: The heavier the better, send me tanks
rum04n_choice_moto: Motorized units and Spetsnaz would help
rum04n_medal_2_unlock: Destoy the ships with direct fire from the coast
rum04n_medal_3_unlock: Don't request any reinforcements from the Colonel
rum04n_dial_0010: Kuressaare... So this has been the rear base from which the US Marines have been deploying their reinforcements into Estonia all along.
rum04n_dial_0020: Time to cut off the last head of the Hydra.
rum04n_dial_0030: Our scouts have identified the first enemy strongpoint around that large mall. Start your attack in this direction, Kommander.
rum04n_dial_0040: Meanwhile, I will launch my assault from the left and flank them. We meet at the airbase. Demidov out.
rum04n_dial_0050: Here they are. Get ready for battle.
rum04n_dial_0060: Don't waste time, Kommander. Use every asset at your disposal. Our success depends on our ability to advance simultaneously!
rum04n_dial_0070: Kommander, all their reinforcements are heading my way. Intensify your assault on your side!
rum04n_dial_0080: Excellent work, Kommander! You've secured a foothold in the city. Continue your offensive across the swamps.
rum04n_dial_0090: Secure the second half of the city; we’ll stage the final assault on the airbase from there.
rum04n_dial_0100: Progress is fast on my side. I can transfer some reinforcements from my group. What would be most helpful, Kommander?
rum04n_dial_0110: Every ten years, someone claims their latest gadget will mark the end of tanks. And yet, they are still rolling. Be careful with our new T-14s, though; they're still technically in field trials.
rum04n_dial_0120: Kurganets and Barbaris; our latest infantry fighting vehicles equipped with 57mm autocannons and active protection systems. I see you're a man of taste, Kommander.
rum04n_dial_0130: Speed is of the essence, isn’t it, Kommander? Our latest Bumerang armored personnel carriers offer both speed and firepower, equipped with 30mm autocannons and Kornet anti-tank missiles.
rum04n_dial_0140: Nothing? Are you sure? Don't get overconfident, it's a mistake that can cost lives, as you well know.
rum04n_dial_0150: The enemy will throw everything they have to stop your advance. And they have plenty of helicopters available. So make sure to bring along some anti-air units!
rum04n_dial_0160: Cruise missiles incoming from the American ships! Make sure you have SHORAD coverage to intercept them, and stay on the move to avoid becoming a juicy target!
rum04n_dial_0170: Kommander, our aircraft have been engaged by surface-to-air missiles. Air support will remain unavailable until they are eliminated.
rum04n_dial_0180: The Americans are landing reserve forces on the shore. Prepare for counter-attacks.
rum04n_dial_0190: Enemy air defense neutralized! Great job, Kommander! Our birds are at your disposal.
rum04n_dial_0200: Hey, remember us, Kommander? You saved our lives in Tallinn. Our Su-24s are ready to support you.
rum04n_dial_0210: Excellent, the entire city is under our control.
rum04n_dial_0220: There is a large concentration of enemy tanks defending the airfield. Let's strike simultaneously from both directions to force them to expose their side armor.
rum04n_dial_0230: We're taking fire from enemy artillery, Kommander. They’re closer to your position, take them out!
rum04n_dial_0240: No more artillery for you today, пиндосы! Keep up the good work, Kommander!
rum04n_dial_0250: Watch out, another volley of missiles!
rum04n_dial_0260: You're ready to attack, Kommander? Alright, let's go!
rum04n_dial_0270: I'm taking too many losses, I'm pulling back!
rum04n_dial_0280: They’re snapping back, clinging to this patch of land with everything they've got. Continue the assault, we’ll drive them into the sea.
rum04n_dial_0290: The airbase is ours. The last remaining enemy forces are retreating toward their ships. Don't give them a chance to re-embark!
rum04n_dial_0300: The ships are leaving! Don't let them escape, I'm transferring all our anti-ship missile platforms to your control, Kommander: Iskanders, Kamov helicopters, Tupolev bombers.
rum04n_dial_0310: Throw everything we’ve got at them, sink those ships!
rum04n_dial_0330: What?! Why would we do that?!
rum04n_dial_0340: This is part of an agreement we are currently negotiating with the Americans. We're letting their ships leave in exchange for concessions.
rum04n_dial_0350:
This is just a trick! The moment the ships are out of range they will go back on their promises.
On the contrary, destroying their fleet would strengthen our position.
rum04n_dial_0360: Your opinion on the matter wasn't requested, Colonel. The order comes from above, so do your duty and stand down.
rum04n_dial_0370: Well you know what, I doubt that. It's pretty clear you've had your own agenda for quite a while to pursue your pitiful vengeance against me.
rum04n_dial_0380:
I rather think that you're trying to trick me into failure and use me as your scapegoat.
Destroy those ships, Kommander.
rum04n_dial_0390: Don't do that, Kommander. Following this order would be treason. Don't help this impostor jeopardize our negotiating advantage.
rum04n_dial_0400: The ships are escaping, do something, Kommander! Don't tell me you're siding with this manipulative bitch!
rum04n_dial_0410: Yes, I stole her father's memoirs. But that was more than 30 years ago. Life was tough back then, after the fall of the Soviet Union, the country was in chaos. We weren’t eating our fill!
rum04n_dial_0420: I needed the money, and people needed heroes and glorious war stories. So everyone was happy with it, including the higher-ups who knew all along. They let it slide because it served a purpose.
rum04n_dial_0430: The ships are out of range, thank you for your trust, Kommander. Now the world will know who Gregory Demidov really is; and he will pay for it, believe me.
rum04n_dial_0440: One ship destroyed, one more to go! Glad to see you're siding with me, Kommander. The past is the past, and winning this war is more important than any petty personal grudges.
rum04n_dial_0450: You made a big mistake, Kommander. Now your fate is bound to that of the Colonel.
rum04n_dial_0460: Second ship destroyed, great job Kommander! So how exactly are the Americans going to negotiate now, without their fleet to intimidate us?
rum04n_dial_0470: One of the ships managed to escape. Well, good luck to the Americans negotiating anything with half their fleet at the bottom and the other half heading home with their tails between their legs.
